products.title: 1U Horizontal Metal Cable Management
products.subtitle: 19 1U Horizontal Metal Cable Management with Cover are use for keeping cable entry points neat and tidy. Cable Managers ensure the best airflow to your equipment. This system employs cable strain relief for increased longevity of your server and networking equipment.
products.description: The Netsys NS-509HMCM1U is a professional-grade 19-inch rack-mount cable management solution designed to streamline and protect network cabling within server racks and cabinets. This 1U horizontal manager is engineered for high-density environments, featuring a sturdy metal construction and a removable cover to ensure a clean, organized, and accessible networking setup. Netsys NS-509HMCM1U The NS-509HMCM1U is a versatile Horizontal Cable Management panel featuring a specialized "finger duct" design. It is the ideal interface between patch panels and switches, providing a structured pathway for copper and fiber cables. By organizing patch cords effectively, it improves airflow within the rack and reduces mechanical stress on equipment ports. Key Features 1U 19-Inch Rack Compatibility: Standardized dimensions ensure a perfect fit in any 19-inch server rack, relay rack, or wall-mount cabinet. Finger Duct Configuration: Features a series of slotted "fingers" that allow cables to be routed neatly into the duct, separating individual cords for easy identification and maintenance. Removable Snap-On Cover: Includes a robust top cover that hides cables from view for a professional aesthetic, while providing quick access for additions or changes (MACs). Enhanced Airflow Management: By grouping and routing cables away from equipment intake and exhaust areas, it helps maintain optimal operating temperatures for active hardware. Durable Cold-Rolled Steel: Constructed from high-quality cold-rolled steel with a black powder-coated finish for maximum durability and resistance to scratches and corrosion. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-509HMCM1U Orientation Horizontal Rack Units 1U Mounting Standard 19" EIA/TIA Standard Material Cold-Rolled Steel & High-Density Plastic (Fingers) Color Black (Powder Coated) Depth Approximately 70–80 mm (standard duct depth) Access Removable Dual-Hinge or Snap-On Cover Best Use Case The NS-509HMCM1U is essential for Data Centers , Telecommunications Rooms , and Enterprise Server Closets . It is best utilized between high-density patch panels and network switches to manage the "spaghetti" effect of patch cords, ensuring that the network remains manageable and scalable as more devices are added.

products.description: Tenda TEF1109P-8-102W 9-Port Unmanaged PoE Switch The Tenda TEF1109P-8-102W is a 9-port 10/100Mbps unmanaged switch featuring 8 PoE ports compliant with IEEE802.3af/at standards, delivering a total PoE power budget of up to 92W. Its fanless design ensures silent operation, and 6KV lightning protection safeguards against electrical surges, making it ideal for video surveillance and wireless networking in small to medium-sized businesses. Key Applications Powering IP surveillance cameras without separate power sources. Supporting wireless access points (APs) for network expansion. Providing reliable networking solutions for offices, hotels, and educational institutions. Usage Warnings Ensure the total PoE load does not exceed 92W to prevent malfunctions. Use CAT5e or higher-grade cables for optimal performance. Avoid installing the device in damp or dusty environments. Technical Specifications Specification Value Number of Ports 9 RJ45 (8 PoE + 1 uplink) Port Speed 10/100 Mbps Network Standards IEEE 802.3, 802.3u, 802.3x, 802.3af/at Switching Capacity 1.8 Gbps Packet Forwarding Rate 1.34 Mpps MAC Address Table 2000 entries Total PoE Power Budget 92W Max PoE per Port 30W Operating Modes Standard / VLAN Lightning Protection 6KV Dimensions 177.5 × 104 × 26 mm Operating Temperature 0~45°C

products.title: AC1750 Wireless Dual Band Gigabit Ceiling Mount Access Point
products.subtitle: Dual-band wireless access point delivering up to 1750 Mbps with MU-MIMO technology, cloud-managed via Omada platform, ideal for ceiling mounting.
products.description: TP-Link EAP245 AC1750 Wireless Dual-Band Gigabit Access Point Elite Speed and Capacity for Professional High-Density Networks Experience superior wireless performance with the EAP245 . Featuring 3x3 MIMO technology , this access point delivers combined dual-band speeds of up to 1750Mbps . Designed for ceiling or wall mounting, its professional aesthetic hides a powerhouse of networking features, including seamless roaming and centralized cloud management. Key Features Ultra-Fast Dual-Band Wi-Fi: Simultaneous 450Mbps on 2.4GHz and 1300Mbps on 5GHz totals 1750Mbps Wi-Fi speeds, perfect for 4K streaming and large file transfers. Integrated into Omada SDN: Zero-Touch Provisioning (ZTP), Centralized Cloud Management, and Intelligent Monitoring. Manage your entire network from one interface via the Omada app or Cloud Controller. Seamless Roaming: Supports 802.11k/v fast roaming , ensuring video streams and voice calls remain uninterrupted as users move between different access points in the building. Advanced Wireless Tech: Equipped with MU-MIMO , Airtime Fairness, and Beamforming technologies to optimize network efficiency and provide stable connections to multiple devices at once. Dual Gigabit Ports: Features two Gigabit Ethernet ports (one supporting PoE) for high-speed wired backhaul and bridging to other devices. Flexible Power Options: Supports both Standard 802.3at PoE and Passive PoE (PoE adapter included), making installation versatile even without nearby power outlets. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Wireless Standard IEEE 802.11ac/n/g/b/a Speed 5GHz: Up to 1300Mbps | 2.4GHz: Up to 450Mbps MIMO Technology 3x3 MU-MIMO Interface 2 x Gigabit Ethernet (RJ-45) Ports Power Supply 802.3at PoE or 48V Passive PoE Ceiling/Wall Mount Kit Included Dimensions 205.5 × 181.5 × 37.1 mm Why Upgrade to the EAP245? "The EAP245 is the 'Power User' choice. While the EAP115 is great for basic coverage, the EAP245 uses Gigabit ports and AC1750 speeds to ensure that your internet bottleneck isn't the Wi-Fi. It’s built to handle 100+ clients without breaking a sweat." Ideal Applications Corporate Offices: Reliable, high-speed Wi-Fi for laptops, VoIP, and video conferencing. Education: Support for entire classrooms of tablets and laptops syncing data at once. Hospitality: High-capacity guest Wi-Fi for lobbies, conference rooms, and restaurants.

products.description: APC Easy UPS BVX 2200VA (Schuko Outlets) The BVX2200LI-GR is a Line-Interactive UPS that offers the perfect balance between robust power backup and advanced voltage regulation. Featuring Schuko (Type F) outlets , it is specifically designed for European and compatible markets, allowing you to plug in standard household and office equipment directly without the need for specialized adapters. Key Features Automatic Voltage Regulation (AVR): Instantly corrects incoming voltage fluctuations (brownouts or overvoltages) to a safe level, preserving battery life for when you actually need it. High Power Capacity: With a 1200W / 2200VA output, it can support multiple high-drain devices simultaneously. Schuko Outlets: Equipped with 4 standard Schuko outlets, providing both battery backup and surge protection for your most critical gear. Intelligent Battery Management: Maximizes battery performance and reliability through precision charging. Sleek, Functional Design: A compact tower footprint and LED status indicators make it easy to monitor and fit into any office or home environment. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Output Power Capacity 1200 Watts / 2.2kVA Nominal Output Voltage 230V Output Connections 4 x Schuko (Battery Backup & Surge) Topology Line Interactive Waveform Type Stepped approximation to a sinewave Transfer Time 6ms typical (10ms maximum)

products.description: The Netsys NS-BB8686-45 is a professional-grade surface mounting solution designed to provide a clean and secure housing for standard 86mm x 86mm faceplates and wall outlets. Netsys NS-BB8686-45 The NS-BB8686-45 is a robust, universal surface-mount back box (gang box) finished in a sleek signal white. It is the ideal choice for environments where in-wall installation is not possible or preferred, providing a professional "low-profile" look while ensuring ample internal space for cable management and connector depth. Key Features Universal 86mm Compatibility: Perfectly fits all standard $86 imes 86$ mm UK/European style faceplates, including RJ45 data ports, telephone outlets, and fiber optic wall plates. Extended 45mm Depth: The generous 45mm depth is critical for maintaining the proper bend radius of copper and fiber cables, preventing signal degradation caused by tight kinks or compression. High-Impact Construction: Manufactured from premium, flame-retardant ABS plastic, ensuring long-term durability and resistance to yellowing over time. Versatile Cable Entry: Features multiple "knock-out" points on the sides and rear, allowing for flexible cable entry from trunking, conduits, or directly through the wall. Threaded Brass Inserts: Equipped with durable brass screw threads for secure faceplate mounting, preventing the stripping issues commonly found in cheaper all-plastic alternatives. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-BB8686-45 Type Surface Mount Back Box Dimensions $86 imes 86 imes 45$ mm Material High-Impact, Flame-Retardant ABS Color Signal White Mounting Holes Multi-point rear mounting slots Insert Material Threaded Brass Compatibility Standard 86-type Faceplates Best Use Case The NS-BB8686-45 is the preferred choice for commercial office fit-outs , residential networking , and industrial environments where surface-mounted trunking is utilized. Its extra depth makes it particularly suitable for shielded Cat6A jacks and Fiber Optic pigtails , where extra room is required to house the connector body and slack cable safely.

products.subtitle: The Cisco Business 220 Series are affordable switches with ease of use, security, and reliability for business-class networks. Cisco Business 220 Series provides an excellent solution.
products.description: Description CBS220-24T-4X Cisco Systems CBS220-24T-4X- Specifications CBS220-24T-4X-NA Smart 24-Port GE, 4x10G SFP+ Overview Value statement Simple, affordable business networking Product overview From connectivity to cloud applications, networking plays a crucial role in every business journey. Reliability, security, and affordability continue to be priorities, while ongoing management and operations add additional complexity that takes time and resources. Cisco Business is a portfolio of affordable wireless access points, switches, and routers designed and built for Small Business. Managed through Cisco Business Dashboard and mobile app, the portfolio provides a simple and reliable experience. Cisco Business Dashboard simplifies traditional challenges in deploying and managing business networks by automating the deployment, monitoring, and lifecycle management of the network. Cisco Business 220 Series Smart Switches The Cisco Business 220 Series are affordable smart switches with ease of use, security, and reliability for business-class networks. With intuitive dashboard, Power over Ethernet (PoE) options, and customizable features, these switches deliver a solid business network within your budget parameters. When you need a business-class network and cost is top priority, Cisco Business 220 Series provides an excellent solution. Prominent feature | Business Applications With Cisco Business 220 Series switches, you can not only build an efficient and reliable network to connect the workforce, you can also create advanced solutions to deliver data, voice, and video services on a converged infrastructure. Get the best value for your money by improving the productivity of employees. Possible deployment scenarios include: Small office networking: The versatility and affordability of the Cisco Business 220 Series family of switches provide an ideal business-class networking foundation for small businesses with limited IT support and budget. Wireless connectivity. With PoE+ support, and comprehensive security and Quality of Service (QoS) capabilities, Cisco Business 220 Series switches provide a solid foundation to add business-grade wireless to the network. You can easily deploy Cisco Business wireless access points to increase workforce productivity without worrying about power and throughput. Unified communications . The Cisco Business 220 Series switches provide QoS features to automatically prioritize delay-sensitive traffic to help you easily deploy an IP-based communication solution on a converged network. PoE+ support can enable IP cameras and videophones to be easily added to your current network. Cisco offers a complete portfolio of IP telephony and other unified communications products designed for small businesses. Cisco Business 220 Series switches have been rigorously tested to help ensure easy integration and full compatibility with these and other vendor products. products.title: CBS350-24T-4G-EU Managed 24-port GE, 4x1G SFP
products.subtitle: The Cisco Business 350 Series Switches, part of the Cisco Business line of network solutions, is a portfolio of affordable managed switches that provides a critical building block for any small office network. you’re ready for the Cisco Business 350 Series Switches.
products.description: The Cisco Business CBS350-24T-4G-EU is a high-performance managed switch designed to provide reliable connectivity and advanced security for growing small-to-medium business networks. As part of the Cisco Business 350 series, this model offers a perfect balance of affordability and capability, ensuring your office infrastructure stays connected and secure. Key Features High-Density Port Configuration: Features 24 Gigabit Ethernet ports for high-speed wired connections to servers, workstations, and other networking hardware. Flexible Uplinks: Includes 4 dedicated Gigabit SFP ports , allowing for high-bandwidth fiber optic uplinks to aggregate traffic or connect floors without sacrificing any of the 24 copper ports. Advanced Management: A user-friendly web-based dashboard and the Cisco Business Mobile app simplify deployment and configuration, while full CLI support is available for advanced IT professionals. Layer 3 Static Routing: Enables efficient traffic handling and internal routing between VLANs, reducing the load on your main router and improving overall network performance. Robust Security: Protects your data with advanced features like IEEE 802.1X port security, IPv6 First Hop Security, and Access Control Lists (ACLs). Technical Specifications Feature Details Model Number CBS350-24T-4G-EU Total Ports 24 x 10/100/1000 ports + 4 x Gigabit SFP Switching Capacity 56 Gbps Forwarding Rate 41.66 Mpps Layer Support Layer 2 and Layer 3 Static Routing Form Factor 1U Rackmount (Hardware included) Region EU (European Power Cord included)

products.title: Cisco Business CBS220-16P-2G Smart Switch (16-Port PoE+ Gigabit with 2 × 1 G SFP Uplinks)
products.subtitle: Cisco Business smart switch with 16 PoE+ Gigabit Ethernet ports and 2 1 G SFP uplinks, manageable via web UI or Cisco Business Dashboard, with 3-year limited hardware warranty.
products.description: Cisco CBS220-16P-2G Smart PoE+ Switch – Product Overview The Cisco CBS220-16P-2G Smart PoE+ Switch is part of the Cisco Business 220 Series, offering reliable and affordable networking for small and medium businesses. With 16 Gigabit Ethernet PoE+ ports and 2 SFP uplinks , this smart switch provides high-speed connectivity, intelligent control, and silent operation in a compact design. Why Choose Cisco CBS220-16P-2G? 16-Port Gigabit Switch with PoE+ support (up to 30W per port). Ideal for powering IP cameras, VoIP phones, and wireless access points . Smart management via Web UI, Cisco Business Dashboard, and mobile app. Advanced features like VLANs, QoS, and ACLs ensure secure and optimized performance. Fanless design for silent operation in offices, classrooms, or retail stores. Key Benefits of Cisco Business Switches The CBS220-16P-2G combines PoE+ power and intelligent management , making it an excellent choice for businesses that need reliable networking without the complexity of enterprise-grade switches. It is energy-efficient, cost-effective, and designed for long-term use with a 3-year limited warranty. Usage Notes and Warnings Total PoE power budget is 130W; verify requirements before connecting multiple powered devices. Supports PoE+ (802.3at) , but not PoE++; devices requiring more than 30W per port are not supported. Being a Smart Switch , it provides simplified management but is not a fully Layer 3 enterprise switch. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model Cisco CBS220-16P-2G Smart PoE+ Switch Ports 16 × Gigabit Ethernet PoE+ RJ-45, 2 × 1G SFP uplinks PoE Power Budget 130W total (up to 30W per port) Switching Capacity 36 Gbps Forwarding Rate 26.78 mpps PoE Standards IEEE 802.3af (PoE), IEEE 802.3at (PoE+) Cooling Fanless design for silent operation Management Web-based GUI, Cisco Business Dashboard, mobile app Security Port security, 802.1X, access control lists (ACLs) Warranty 3-Year Limited Hardware Warranty

products.description: Product Overview The Cisco CBS110-16T-EU is part of the Cisco Business 110 Series unmanaged switches, offering a cost-effective and reliable solution for small to medium businesses. It delivers fast 16-port Gigabit Ethernet connectivity, fan-less silent operation, and energy efficiency thanks to IEEE 802.3az support. Key Use Cases Quick expansion of small offices or branch networks via plug-and-play simplicity. Connecting computers, network printers, wireless access points, and other devices with ease. Ideal for noise-sensitive environments like classrooms, open offices, or meeting rooms. Includes QoS, loop detection, and cable diagnostics to maintain stable, optimized performance. Usage Warnings This unit does not support Power over Ethernet (PoE) — opt for the “PP” variants if PoE is required. Unmanaged design means no configuration capability — it is purely plug-and-play. Ensure use of Cat 5e or better cables for consistent full-speed Gigabit performance. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Switching Capacity 32 Gbps Packet Rate (64-byte) 23.8 mpps Ports 16 × Gigabit RJ-45 Packet Buffer 2 Mbit Dimensions (W × D × H) 279 × 170 × 44 mm Max Power Consumption (220 V) 11.53 W Cooling Fan-less Processor ARM 400 MHz, 128 MB RAM LED Indicators Power, Link/Activity, Gigabit, Cable Diagnostics, Loop Detection Energy Efficiency IEEE 802.3az Warranty Limited Lifetime

products.description: Cisco CBS350-24FP-4G-EU: Professional Network Performance The Cisco CBS350-24FP-4G-EU switch is part of the Cisco Business 350 Series, designed to meet the needs of medium to advanced networks. It offers 24 Gigabit ports supporting PoE+ with a total power budget of up to 370W, allowing the operation of devices such as access points, cameras, and VoIP devices without the need for separate power sources. Additionally, it includes 4 SFP ports for fiber connectivity, enhancing network flexibility and scalability. Key Applications: Medium to large office networks. Powering PoE-dependent network devices like cameras and access points. Environments requiring high security and advanced network management. Usage Warnings: Ensure the total PoE power budget (370W) is not exceeded. Install the switch in a well-ventilated environment with appropriate temperature (from -5 to 50°C). products.title: D-Link 10-Port Gigabit PoE Switch DGS-1010MP
products.subtitle: The D-Link DGS-1010MP is a 10-port Gigabit Unmanaged PoE Switch designed for small-to-medium business networks. It simplifies the deployment of PoE devices such as IP cameras, VoIP phones, and Wi-Fi access points by delivering both data and power over a single Ethernet cable.
products.description: D-Link 10-Port Gigabit PoE Switch DGS-1010MP Upgrade your network efficiency with the D-Link DGS-1010MP , a reliable and high-performance 10-port Gigabit PoE switch designed for small to medium-sized business environments. Whether you are powering IP cameras, VoIP phones, or wireless access points, this switch provides the perfect balance of power and speed to keep your infrastructure running smoothly. Key Features 10 Gigabit Ports: High-speed, non-blocking switching architecture ensures maximum data throughput for bandwidth-intensive applications. Smart PoE+ Support: Equipped with 8 PoE+ enabled ports (IEEE 802. 3at/af), delivering up to 30W per port for seamless connectivity and power to your PoE devices. Total Power Budget: Features a generous 125W power budget to support multiple high-demand devices simultaneously. Plug-and-Play Simplicity: No configuration required—simply connect your devices, and the switch automatically detects the power and speed requirements. Durable Design: Built with a sturdy, fanless metal housing for silent operation and long-term reliability in any office setting. Extended Range Mode: Toggle the built-in switch to extend PoE transmission distance up to 250 meters, perfect for remote security cameras and wireless access points. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Total Ports 10 (8 RJ-45, 2 SFP) PoE Standards IEEE 802.3af / 802.3at (PoE+) PoE Budget 125 Watts Switching Capacity 20 Gbps Form Factor Desktop / Rackmountable (11-inch) Housing Durable Metal Case

products.description: D-Link 16-Port Gigabit Smart Managed PoE Switch + 2 SFP Combo Ports DGS-1100-18PV2 The DGS-1100-18PV2 is part of the Smart Managed VV2 series, designed to provide a versatile solution for businesses looking to power devices like IP cameras, VoIP phones, and Wireless Access Points. With a 130W PoE budget and a fanless design, it offers silent, reliable operation in any office environment. Key Features High-Speed Connectivity: Features 16 x 10/100/1000 Mbps Gigabit ports and 2 x Gigabit SFP/RJ45 Combo ports for flexible fiber or copper uplinks. Power Over Ethernet: 16 ports support IEEE 802.3af/802.3at PoE, delivering up to 30W per port with a total budget of 130W. products.title: D-Link 16 Port Gigabit Unmanaged POE Switch with 2 SFP ports 250 watts
products.subtitle: An unmanaged D‑Link switch with 16 Gigabit PoE ports and 2 SFP uplink ports.
products.description: D-Link 16 Port Gigabit Unmanaged POE Switch with 2 SFP ports 250 watts DGS-F1016P The DGS-F1016P combines high-speed Gigabit connectivity with robust Power over Ethernet (PoE) capabilities. With a generous 150W total PoE budget , it can easily power up to 16 IP cameras, VoIP phones, or Access Points. Its "Unmanaged" design means it’s ready to work right out of the box, while the built-in intelligent DIP switches offer specialized modes for enhanced security and stability. Key Features High-Power PoE+: 16 x 10/100/1000 Mbps PoE ports supporting IEEE 802.3af/at standards (up to 30W per port). Long-Range Surveillance: Built-in "Extend" mode allows for data and power transmission up to 250 meters , perfect for large warehouses or outdoor perimeters. VLAN Isolation: One-click DIP switch to isolate ports from each other, preventing "broadcast storms" and enhancing network security. Intelligent QoS: Prioritizes video traffic automatically to ensure smooth, stutter-free surveillance footage. 6KV Surge Protection: Built-in lightning protection guards the switch against electrical surges, ensuring long-term reliability in unpredictable weather. Plug-and-Play: No configuration required—simply mount it in a 19-inch rack or place it on a desktop and start connecting. Technical Specifications Feature Details Total Ports 16 x Gigabit PoE Ports PoE Power Budget 150 Watts Switching Capacity 32 Gbps Max Transmission (Extend Mode) 250 Meters (at 10Mbps) Mounting 19-inch Rack Mountable (Brackets included) Dimensions 280 x 180 x 44 mm

products.title: D-Link 16-Port Gigabit Unmanaged Switch
products.subtitle: The D-Link DGS-1016C is a 16-Port Gigabit Unmanaged Switch designed to offer a cost-effective, high-speed networking boost for Small Office/Home Office (SOHO) and Small-to-Medium Business (SMB) environments. It is a "plug-and-play" device, meaning it requires no configuration—simply plug in your Ethernet cables and it works immediately.
products.description: D-Link 16-Port Gigabit Unmanaged Switch DGS-1016C The DGS-1016C is an economical, plug-and-play networking solution for SOHO and small-to-medium businesses. It provides 16 dedicated Gigabit ports, allowing you to easily expand your network and upgrade your connectivity to the latest Gigabit standard. Key Features Gigabit Performance: 16 x 10/100/1000 Mbps ports deliver high-speed data transfers for bandwidth-heavy tasks like CAD files, 4K video streaming, and server backups. Zero Configuration: As an unmanaged switch, it requires no setup. Simply plug it in and connect your devices—perfect for businesses without a dedicated IT department. Energy Efficient: Features D-Link Green technology , which reduces power consumption by automatically putting inactive ports into "sleep mode" and adjusting power based on cable length. Auto-MDI/MDIX: Eliminates the need for crossover cables; every port automatically detects if a straight-through or crossover cable is needed. Durable Design: Housed in a sturdy metal chassis that supports desktop placement or rackmounting (brackets included). Technical Specifications Feature Specification Port Count 16 x 10/100/1000 Mbps Gigabit Ports Switching Capacity 32 Gbps MAC Address Table 8K Entries RAM Buffer 256 KB per device Housing Metal (Rackmountable) Design Fanless (Silent Operation)

products.title: D-Link 18-Port 10/100BASE-TX PoE Unmanaged Surveillance Switch DSS-100E-18P
products.subtitle: An 18‑port unmanaged PoE surveillance switch (16 PoE ports plus Gigabit uplink and combo port) delivering up to 230 W total PoE power with extended range and surge protection
products.description: الوصف الكامل (عربي) يمثل مفتاح D-Link DSS-100E-18P الخيار الأمثل لنظام مراقبة متكامل بلا أسلاك إضافية؛ حيث يجمع بين نقل البيانات وتوصيل الطاقة عبر كابل إيثرنت واحد. تعريف المنتج هو مفتاح شبكة غير مدار يحتوي على 16 منفذ PoE (يدعم IEEE 802.3af/at) ومنفذي uplink جيجابت (أحدهما Combo RJ-45/SFP)، مدعوم بميزانية طاقة PoE تصل إلى 230 واط ويوفر مدى يصل إلى 250 مترًا ويحتوي على حماية من التفريغ الكهربائي حتى 6 kV. أبرز الاستخدامات ربط وتشغيل كاميرات IP في أنظمة المراقبة بدون حاجة إلى مزودات طاقة منفصلة. ربط نقاط الوصول (Access Points) وهواتف VoIP وأجهزة NAS ضمن الشبكة. أنظمة مراقبة طويلة المدى تصل إلى 250 مترًا بدون توصيلات إضافية. تحذيرات الاستخدام تأكد من أن إجمالي أجهزة PoE المتصلة لا تتجاوز ميزانية الطاقة (230 واط). استخدم كابلات بجودة عالية لتفادي فقد الطاقة على مسافات طويلة. رغم وجود حماية من الصواعق، يُفضل توصيل الأرضي عند التثبيت الخارجي. جدول المواصفات الفنية البند التفاصيل PoE ports 16 × 10/100 Mbps، PoE/PoE+، حتى 30 W لكل منفذ Uplink ports 1 × Gigabit، 1 × Gigabit/ SFP Combo ميزانية PoE 230 W مدى PoE حتى 250 متر حماية تفريغ كهربائي حتى 6 kV Energy Efficient (EEE) IEEE 802.3az سعة التبديل Forwarding 7.2 Gbps (5.36 Mpps) الذاكرة المؤقتة Packet Buffer 2.75 Mbits جدول MAC 4K عناوين الأبعاد 440 × 178 × 44 مم الوزن 2.137 كجم Full Description (English) The D-Link DSS-100E-18P is an ideal plug-and-play unmanaged PoE switch that combines data transmission and power delivery over a single network cable. Product Definition An unmanaged switch featuring 16 PoE/PoE+ ports (IEEE 802.3af/at), a total PoE power budget of 230 W, two Gigabit uplinks (one RJ-45 and one Combo RJ-45/SFP), extended PoE range up to 250 meters, and 6 kV surge protection. Key Uses Ideal for powering IP cameras in surveillance systems without needing separate power injectors. Connecting PoE APs, VoIP phones, and NAS devices in CCTV or IoT networks. Long-range deployments of up to 250 m using standard Ethernet cabling. Usage Warnings Ensure the total PoE devices do not exceed the 230 W power budget. Use quality cabling to avoid voltage drop over extended distances. Even with surge protection, grounding is recommended for outdoor installations. Technical Specifications Table Feature Details PoE Ports 16 × 10/100 Mbps PoE/PoE+ (up to 30 W per port) Uplink Ports 1 × Gigabit RJ-45, 1 × Gigabit/SFP combo PoE Budget 230 W PoE Range Up to 250 meters Surge Protection Up to 6 kV Energy-Efficient Ethernet IEEE 802.3az Switching Fabric 7.2 Gbps (5.36 Mpps) Packet Buffer Memory 2.75 Mbits MAC Address Table 4K entries Dimensions 440 × 178 × 44 mm Weight 2.137 kg

products.title: D-Link 8Port Desktop Gigabit Max PoE Switch DGS-1008MP
products.subtitle: The D-Link DGS-1008MP is a robust, high-power desktop switch designed primarily for surveillance and small business networks that need to power multiple devices.
products.description: Description DGS-1008MP Something of a powerhouse when it comes to Power-over-Ethernet switches, this compact beauty offers PoE to 802.3af/at standard across all eight Gigabit Ethernet ports, at up to 30 Watts per port with a power budget total of 125 Watts. Which, put simply, means you can power devices such as access points, IP phones and video surveillance cameras simply by plugging them in with an Ethernet cable – no additional power required. Specification Number of ports 5 to 14 ports Main type of ports 1000BASE-T Gigabit Ethernet Switching capacity 16 Gbps PoE options 802.3af 802.3at Number of PoE ports 8 PoE power budget See datasheet Fanless YES D-Link Green YES 802.3az Energy-Efficient Ethernet support YES Form Factor Desktop Rackmountable Housing Metal Jumbo frame YES Cable diagnostics YES MAC address 4K PoE The DGS-1008MP features 8 x 10/100/1000BASE-T ports that support the IEEE 802.3at PoE+ protocol. Each of the 8 PoE+ ports can supply up to 30 watts with a total PoE power budget of 125 watts. PoE is especially suitable for devices that are far from power outlets or when you want to minimise the clutter of extra cables. Superior Performance No configuration is required and installation is quick and easy. Support for Auto MDI/MDI-X on all ports eliminates the need for crossover cables when connecting to another switch. Auto- Negotiation on each port senses the link speed of a network device (10, 100 or 1000 Mbps) and intelligently adjusts for compatibility and optimal performance. The switch has been designed without fans ensuring silent operation wherever it is installed. With wire-speed filtering and store-and-forward switching, the DGS-1008MP maximises network performance while minimising the transmission of bad network packets. Energy Saving DGS-1008MP switches feature both D-Link Green 3.0 Technology and IEEE802.3az Energy Efficient Ethernet (EEE) to cut operating costs without sacrificing operational performance or functionality. With D-Link Green technology, the switches constantly monitor the link status and network utilisation of every port. The switches also automatically detect cable length and can reduce transmission power usage for shorter cables. By pairing EEE capable devices with DGS-1008MP switches organizations can drastically reduce power consumption by automatically putting ports into a sleep mode when not being used.

products.title: D-link DAP-1360 Wireless N Range Extender
products.subtitle: The D-Link DAP-1360 Wireless N Range Extender can provide your wired network with wireless connectivity, or upgrade your existing wireless network and extend its coverage.
products.description: Description DAP-1360 The D-Link DAP-1360 Wireless N Range Extender can provide your wired network with wireless connectivity, or upgrade your existing wireless network and extend its coverage. Enjoy surfing the web, checking e-mail, and chatting with family and friends online, at faster speeds and from previously out-of-reach locations. Wireless Security The DAP-1360 provides 64/128-bit WEP encryption and WPA/WPA2 security to help protect your network and wireless data. This device also supports Wi-Fi Protected Setup (WPS) to quickly and securely set up a wireless network. In addition, the device features MAC address filtering and a disable SSID broadcast function to limit outsiders’ access to your home or office network. Multiple Operation Modes The DAP-1360 offers seven modes of operation, namely Access Point, Wireless Client, Bridge, Bridge with AP, Repeater, WISP Client Router, and WISP Repeater (Range Extender) Mode. These modes allow you to flexibly configure the device for use with different wireless applications. Access Point Mode allows the device to act as a central hub for wireless users. Wireless Client Mode enables the DAP-1360 to connect to another access point. Bridge Mode can join two wired networks together, while Bridge with AP Mode allows the device to act as a wireless hub and a bridge at the same time. Repeater Mode extends wireless coverage to cover all “dead” spots. WISP Client Router Mode allows wireless Internet service subscribers to share Internet connection with home/office Ethernet-enabled computers without the need for an extra router. Finally, the device can act as a WISP Repeater (Range Extender) to let WISP subscribers share their Internet connection with wired and wireless computers without any extra routers. Quick and Easy Installation With the D-Link setup wizard, you can set up your wireless network in minutes. It configures your DAP-1360’s operating mode and makes it easy to add new wireless devices to the network. Create a simple wireless network for your home or office quickly and easily with the DAP-1360. Effective Power Saving The DAP-1360 includes a built-in schedule function that turns the wireless network off when not in use. This feature reduces power consumption, thus saving you both energy and money. DAP-1360 Specs Wireless standard Wireless N Wireless speed 300 Mbps 2.4 GHz Antenna type 2 fixed omni-directional antennas Wired interface 1 x Fast Ethernet LAN Wireless modes Access Point (AP) Wireless client Wireless extender

products.title: D-link DAP-1530 AC750 Plus Wi-Fi Range Extender
products.subtitle: The DAP-1530 AC750 Plus Wi-Fi Range Extender is a plug-in repeater that lets you extend an existing wireless network.
products.description: Description The DAP-1530 AC750 Plus Wi-Fi Range Extender is a plug-in repeater that lets you extend an existing wireless network. You can place it anywhere in your home to increase the range of your wireless network. Tiny yet powerful, it supports Wireless AC speeds of up to 750 Mbps, yet fits in the palm of your hand. FEATURES Compatible with any wireless router brand Wireless AC with speeds up to 300 Mbps (2.4 GHz) + 433 Mbps (5 GHz) Dual-band connectivity Supports D-Link Wi-Fi Mesh and Mesh Smart Roaming Wireless 802.11n/g/b/a backward compatibility Supports WPA3™ wireless encryption Push-button for easy setup Built-in Fast Ethernet port for connecting a wired device or operating as an access point Signal strength indicator for optimum placement Foldable antennas DAP-1530 Specification Antenna External antennas (2×2+2×2) Beamforming N/A D-Link QRS Mobile Yes D-Link SharePort Mobile N/A D-Link Wi-Fi N/A LAN 1 x Fast Ethernet (10/100) Memory 64MB 8MB MU-MIMO N/A Product Description AC750 Plus Wi-Fi Range Extender USB 2.0/3.0 N/A Wireless Speed 300 Mbps (2.4 GHz) + 433 Mbps (5 GHz) Wireless Standard 802.11a/b/g/n/ac with concurrent dual-band WPA2-PSK (Personal) Yes Effortlessly Extend your Network with Wireless AC Performance The DAP-1530 AC750 Plus Wi-Fi Range Extender is a plug-in repeater that lets you extend an existing wireless network. You can place it anywhere in your home to increase the range of your wireless network. Tiny yet powerful, it supports Wireless AC speeds of up to 750 Mbps, yet fits in the palm of your hand. Why You Want It Dual Band AC750 High-speed Wi-Fi for all your browsing, streaming and gaming needs Mesh Network & Smart Roaming Create a single whole-home mesh network that auto-connects mobile devices to the strongest Wi-Fi signal 1 Smart Connect Technology Automatically assigns each device to the best wireless band for optimal performance Works with your Wi-Fi Router Quickly and easily extend your existing Wi-Fi network Gigabit Port Gigabit port lets you connect a wired device to your wireless network DAP-1530 D-Link Wi-Fi Mesh Seamless mesh Wi-Fi throughout your entire home DAP-1530 One Touch Setup Simply press the WPS button on your Wi-Fi extender for an effortless setup DAP-1530 Enhanced Wireless Security Connect to wireless networks securely using the latest WPA3™ 128-bit encryption. Eliminate Wi-Fi Dead Zones Throughout Your Home Increase the coverage of your home Wireless AC network with the sleek and easy-to-use DAP-1530 AC750 Plus Wi-Fi Range Extender. Dual-band technology helps reduce interference from nearby wireless transmitters in the home, and also provides backward compatibility with older wireless devices in your network, allowing you to enjoy a blazing-fast, reliable wireless connection. Alternatively, use the built-in Ethernet port and your home’s existing wired Ethernet cabling to extend wireless coverage without worrying about signal strength. DAP-1530 Easy to Set Up and Easy to Use Push the WPS one-touch configuration button, push the WPS button on your existing Wi-Fi device, and you’re done. The DAP-1530 will automatically configure itself. It even includes a built-in setup wizard should you want finer control of wired and wireless settings. DAP-1530 Signal Strength Indicator Just plug it in and use the LED signal indicator to find the best location to extend your network. Get optimal Wi-Fi coverage with zero guessing. DAP-1530 Flexible Mesh Choices for Your Home Network Pair the DAP-1530 with a compatible D-Link Wi-Fi Mesh router to create a seamless whole-home mesh network built on industry-standard mesh technology that cleverly shares the same name as your existing network and allows you to enjoy a seamless connection throughout your entire home. Meanwhile, Mesh Smart Roaming allows your devices to intelligently switch to a stronger Wi-Fi signal as you move around the house. Pair with other routers or extenders which support the 802.11k/v standard to enjoy Mesh Smart Roaming throughout your home at all times.

products.title: D-Link DAP-1610 AC1200 WiFi Range Extender

products.description: Description DAP-1610 Plug in to a power outlet to extend your home’s wireless network and start enjoying a blazing-fast and reliable wireless connection, even in those harder-to-reach areas. DAP-1610 Specs Wireless standard Wireless AC Frequency band mode Dual-band simultaneous Wireless speed 300 Mbps 2.4 GHz 867 Mbps 5 GHz Antenna type 2 fixed omni-directional antennas Wired interface 1 x Fast Ethernet LAN Wireless modes Wireless client Wirele ss extender Expand your Wi-Fi coverage Plug in to expand your wireless home network. Dual-Band Wi-Fi Performance Two simultaneous wireless bands for high-speed Wi-Fi with reduced interference. Smart Signal Strength LEDs Helps you find the best location in your home for optimal coverage. One-Touch Connections Connect a device to your Wi-Fi with a touch of a button. Ethernet Port Connect to wired devices like Smart TVs or games consoles, or create a wireless hotspot. Bring life to signal dead zones Plug in to a power outlet to extend your home’s wireless network and start enjoying a blazing-fast and reliable wireless connection, even in those harder-to-reach areas. 3.6x faster Wireless AC provides Gigabit wireless speeds with up to 3.6 times the performance of the most common type of Wi-Fi found within most households. Dual-band wireless for efficient performance The 2.4 GHz band can be for everyday tasks like web browsing, while the high-speed 5 GHz band has less wireless interference and congestion, giving you better performance and a lag-free wireless experience for video streaming, online gaming and large file transfers. Portable With LED signal strength indicators, you can find the perfect place in your home to dramatically increase your Wi-Fi coverage and remove signal dead zones. And full backwards compatibility means you’ll be able to connect any wireless device to the extender. Speedy Setup Use the WPS one-touch button on your router and on the range extender to increase your Wi-Fi signal range in seconds. Or grab your phone and link the extender to one of our powerful D-Link routers using our free QRS Mobile app to connect to your home router.

products.description: تعريف المنتج سويتش D-Link DES-F1016P-E هو جهاز غير مدار (unmanaged) مصمم بشكل خاص لتلبية احتياجات أنظمة المراقبة والتغذية بالطاقة عبر PoE لمسافات طويلة. يضم 16 منفذ 10/100 Mbps، بالإضافة إلى منفذ صاعد Gigabit أو Combo (RJ45/SFP)، ويتيح تغذية عبر Ethernet دون الحاجة لمصادر طاقة إضافية. أبرز الاستخدامات تغذية وتشغيل كاميرات IP ونقاط وصول Wi-Fi في أنظمة المراقبة. تغطية مسافات بعيدة تصل إلى 250 م عبر DIP-switch المناسب. بيئات SOHO والشركات الصغيرة والمتوسطة — تركيب سهل بدون إعدادات. تحذيرات الاستخدام يُستخدم كابل Cat5e أو Cat6 للحصول على أفضل أداء في وضع EXTEND لمسافة طويلة. تأكد من أن إجمالي استهلاك الأجهزة لا يتجاوز ميزانية الـ PoE (150 واط). تجنّب درجات حرارة أعلى من 40 °C لضمان الأداء والاستقرار، والتشغيل في بيئة غير مكثفة من الرطوبة (10%-90% دون تكثف). المواصفات الفنية المواصفة التفصيل عدد المنافذ 16 × 10/100 Mbps PoE + 1 × Gigabit Combo (RJ45/SFP) سرعة PoE 150 W إجمالي، حتى 30 W لكل منفذ المدى 250 m على المنافذ 1-8 بوضع EXTEND المعايير IEEE 802.3i/u/ab/z, IEEE 802.3af/at, IEEE 802.3x Flow Control السعة ونقل الحزم 7.2 Gbps Switching, 3.868 Mpps Forwarding حماية Surge حماية 6 kV الأبعاد والوزن 285×180×44 mm، 2.1 kg البيئة التشغيلية Temperature: 0-40 °C, Humidity: 10-90% RH Product Definition The D-Link DES-F1016P-E is an unmanaged long-range PoE+ switch tailored for surveillance and extended-reach applications. It offers 16 10/100 Mbps Ethernet ports, a Gigabit/Combo (RJ45/SFP) uplink, and eliminates the need for separate power adapters by delivering power over Ethernet. Key Applications Powering IP cameras and Wi-Fi access points in surveillance setups. Extending PoE reach up to 250 m with appropriate DIP-switch configuration. Ideal for SOHO and SMB environments—easy plug-and-play installation. Usage Warnings Use Cat5e or Cat6 cables for optimal performance in EXTEND mode. Ensure total PoE power consumption stays within the 150 W budget. Avoid operating above 40 °C and store/use within 10%-90% non-condensing humidity. Technical Specifications Specification Details Ports 16 × 10/100 Mbps PoE + 1 × Gigabit Combo (RJ45/SFP) PoE Power 150 W total, up to 30 W per port Reach 250 m on ports 1-8 in EXTEND mode Standards IEEE 802.3i/u/ab/z, IEEE 802.3af/at, IEEE 802.3x Flow Control Switching Capacity & Forwarding 7.2 Gbps, 3.868 Mpps Protection 6 kV Surge Protection Dimensions & Weight 285×180×44 mm, 2.1 kg Operating Conditions 0-40 °C, 10-90% RH (non-condensing)

products.title: D‑Link DGS‑F1210‑26PS‑E Smart Managed PoE+ Switch

products.description: Product Overview The D-Link DGS-F1210-26PS-E is a smart managed PoE/PoE+ switch featuring 24 Gigabit PoE ports and 2 SFP uplink ports, delivering a total PoE power budget of 400 W. It is ideal for businesses, campuses, and hotels requiring robust, scalable network setups. Key Use Cases Powering IP cameras, wireless access points (APs), and VoIP phones via Ethernet without extra power adapters. Extended range PoE up to 250 meters on ports 1–8 using the Extend feature. Flexible network segmentation through VLANs, QoS, traffic monitoring, and bandwidth control. Advanced security: ACL, IP-MAC-Port binding, DHCP snooping. Usage Warnings Ensure total PoE load does not exceed 400 W. Use certified Ethernet cables (Cat5e or above) to maintain performance. Avoid operating in environments outside the 0 °C–40 °C range. Technical Specifications Specification Details Ports 24 x 10/100/1000 Mbps PoE RJ-45, 2 x Gigabit SFP PoE Budget 400 W total (IEEE 802.3af/at) Long-Reach PoE Up to 250 m on Ports 1–8 (Extend mode) Switching Capacity 52 Gbps Forwarding Rate 38.7 Mpps Surge Protection 6 kV Layer 2 Features VLAN, STP/RSTP/MSTP, LACP, IGMP Snooping, ACL, DHCP Snooping Dimensions / Weight 440 × 180 × 44 mm, ~3.2 kg Operating Conditions Temperature: 0-40 °C, Humidity: 10-90 %

products.title: D-Link DSL-245GE Wireless AC1200 ADSL2+/VDSL2 Modem Router
products.subtitle: Built-in ADSL2+/VDSL2 modem for connecting to your high-speed broadband Internet connection.
products.description: D-Link DSL-245GE Wireless AC1200 ADSL2+/VDSL2 Modem Router The All-in-One Gateway for Reliable High-Speed Internet The D-Link DSL-245GE is a versatile, high-performance router designed for both home and small office environments. Whether you are on a standard ADSL2+/VDSL2 line or have upgraded to High-Speed Fiber , this modem router acts as a powerful central hub. With Gigabit ports and Dual-Band AC1200 Wi-Fi , it ensures that your bandwidth is never bottlenecked, providing smooth 4K streaming and lag-free gaming. Key Features VDSL2/ADSL2+ Built-in Modem: Connects directly to your phone line for high-speed broadband, supporting VDSL2 profiles up to 17a. Fiber-Ready (Ethernet WAN): Features a dedicated Gigabit WAN port, making it fully compatible with Fiber-to-the-Home (FTTH) services. AC1200 Dual-Band Wi-Fi: Delivers speeds up to 867Mbps on the 5GHz band and 300Mbps on the 2.4GHz band, reducing congestion and interference. Full Gigabit Wired Ports: Equipped with 4 Gigabit LAN ports , providing lightning-fast wired connections for Smart TVs, gaming consoles, and NAS storage. Advanced Security: Built-in Dual Active Firewalls (SPI and NAT) and WPA/WPA2 encryption protect your network from intruders and online threats. USB 2.0 Port: Easily share a printer or media files across your network via a connected USB drive. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Device Interfaces 1 x VDSL/ADSL, 1 x Gigabit WAN, 4 x Gigabit LAN, 1 x USB 2.0 Wi-Fi Speed AC1200 (300Mbps 2.4GHz + 867Mbps 5GHz) Antenna Type High-Gain External Antennas Standards 802.11ac/n/g/b, VDSL2, ADSL2/2+ Advanced Features Quality of Service (QoS), IGMP Snooping, VPN Passthrough Security WPA/WPA2, WPS Support, SPI/NAT Firewall Why Choose the DSL-245GE? "The DSL-245GE is a 'future-proof' investment. If you are currently on a VDSL line but plan to move to Fiber soon, you won't need to buy a new router. Its Gigabit ports ensure you get the full speed you pay for from your ISP." Ideal For: Hybrid Households: Users who need a modem for their current DSL line but want the speeds of an AC1200 router. Power Users: Ideal for homes with multiple 4K streaming devices and gaming setups that require Gigabit wired stability. Small Offices: Provides a secure, high-speed backbone for VoIP phones and shared office resources.

products.description: Introduction The D-Link NCB-C6FOBLR-305 is a Cat6 FTP cable designed for outdoor use, featuring a double-layer jacket (inner PVC and UV-resistant outer PVC), making it robust and suitable for harsh environmental conditions while maintaining high performance. High-speed networking up to 1 Gbps. Usage Warnings Avoid prolonged direct exposure to sunlight without additional protection. Not suitable for fire-rated environments unless it also has a fire-rating. Install within recommended temperature range (-20 °C to +70 °C) to avoid jacket damage or performance issues. Technical Specifications Spec Value Cable Type Cat6 FTP (Foiled Twisted Pair) Pairs 4 pairs, foil-wrapped Conductor Solid Bare Copper, 23 AWG Drain Wire 26 AWG Insulation HD-PE Mutual Capacitance 5.6 nF per 100 m Characteristic Impedance 100 Ω ± 15 % Velocity of Propagation 69 % Conductor Resistance < 9.38 Ω/100 m Resistance Unbalance Max 5 % Capacitance Unbalance 330 pF/100 m Delay Skew < 45 ns Conductor Diameter 0.560 mm Insulation Diameter 1.14 mm Overall Cable Diameter Approx. 8.6 mm Operating Temp Range -20 °C to +70 °C Conclusion The D-Link NCB-C6FOBLR-305 is a reliable and cost-effective solution for building durable, high-speed outdoor networks. It offers excellent protection against interference and environmental exposure and is ideal for long-term outdoor networking needs.

products.title: D-Link Patch Cord Cat6 UTP 0.25m – Grey
products.subtitle: D-Link 0.25 Meter UTP CAT6 Patch Cord in Gray color.
products.description: D-Link Patch Cord Cat6 UTP 0.25m – Grey Precision Connectivity for High-Density Racks Minimize clutter and maximize airflow with the D-Link NCB-C6UGRYR1-025 . This ultra-short 0.25-meter Cat6 patch cord is specifically engineered for professional networking environments where "cable spaghetti" is not an option. Perfect for connecting adjacent ports on patch panels and switches, it ensures a clean, high-performance link in the tightest of spaces. Key Features Ultra-Short Length (0.25m): The ideal choice for "zero-slack" patching between high-density switches and patch panels, improving both aesthetics and rack cooling. Cat6 Performance: Fully compliant with TIA/EIA-568-C.2 standards, supporting high-speed data transfer up to 1Gbps (Gigabit Ethernet) and frequencies up to 250MHz . Superior Signal Integrity: High-quality twisted-pair construction significantly reduces Cross-Talk (NEXT) and electromagnetic interference. Snagless Design: Features a molded, snagless boot that protects the RJ45 clip from breaking during frequent re-patching or maintenance. Gold-Plated Contacts: 50-micron gold-plated connectors ensure maximum conductivity and resistance against corrosion over time. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model Number NCB-C6UGRYR1-025 Category Cat6 UTP (Unshielded Twisted Pair) Length 0.25 Meter (approx. 10 inches) Color Professional Grey Connector RJ45 - Snagless Molded Boot Wire Gauge 24 AWG Multi-strand Copper Compliance RoHS, TIA/EIA-568-C.2 Best For: Data Centers & Server Rooms: Eliminates the need for cable management loops between stacked hardware. Clean Patching: Perfect for 1-to-1 mapping between a 24-port switch and a 24-port patch panel directly above it. Small Enclosures: Great for compact wall-mount cabinets where space is at a premium.

products.description: PRODUCT OVERWIEW: NCB-C6UGRYR1-3 is a professional-grade Category 6 (Cat6) UTP Patch Cord designed for high-speed data transmission and reliable network connectivity. 1 At 3 meters (approx. 10 feet) , this cable provides the versatile length needed for connecting workstations to wall outlets or linking networking hardware across larger server racks. Key Features High-Speed Connectivity: Engineered to support bandwidth up to 250 MHz and data speeds up to 1 Gbps (Gigabit Ethernet) . 2 It is fully compliant with TIA/EIA-568-C.2 and ISO/IEC 11801 standards. 3 Versatile 3.0m Length: The 10-foot reach is ideal for "desk-to-wall" connections in office environments or for routing cables through vertical managers between non-adjacent racks in a data center. Snagless Protection: Features a molded snagless boot that shields the RJ45 connector's locking tab. 4 This ensures the cable can be pulled through tight spaces or crowded cable trays without the clip snapping off. 5 Superior Construction: Built with 24 AWG multi-stranded copper conductors for maximum flexibility and durability. 6 The RJ45 plugs are equipped with 50-micron gold-plated contacts to prevent corrosion and maintain a high-quality signal. 7 Universal Compatibility: While optimized for Cat6 networks, it is fully backward compatible with Cat5 and Cat5e equipment, making it a reliable choice for any standard Ethernet environment. 8 Technical Specifications Feature Specification Brand D-Link Category Cat6 UTP (Unshielded Twisted Pair) Length 3.0 Meters (approx. 9.8 feet) Color Grey Connector RJ45 with Snagless Boot Wire Gauge 24 AWG Stranded Copper Bandwidth 250 MHz Data Rate Up to 1 Gbps Best Use Case The NCB-C6UGRYR1-3 is the go-to solution for workstation deployment . It is perfectly sized for connecting a PC, VOIP phone, or wireless access point to a floor box or wall jack, providing enough slack for ergonomics and cable management.

products.description: Product Definition: The D-Link NCB-FS09S-LC1 is a 1 m single-mode fiber optic simplex pigtail with LC connectors on both ends, designed for high-quality fiber optic network connections. Key Applications: Patching within fiber distribution panels. Connecting fiber modules to transceivers inside data centers. Precise optical connections requiring low insertion loss and high reliability. Usage Warnings: Ensure LC connectors remain clean and free from dust or scratches, which can degrade optical performance. Always use protective dust caps when the cable is not in use. Technical Specifications: Specification Details Connector Type LC Fiber Type Single-Mode (G652D, G657A, G657B) Cable Color Yellow (Single-Mode) Cable Jacket PVC or LSZH (optional) Available Lengths 1 m (also available in 2 m and 3 m) Insertion Loss Typical ≤ 0.2 dB (Max 0.3 dB) Return Loss PC ≥ 45 dB; UPC ≥ 50 dB; APC ≥ 60 dB Mechanical Ceramic ferrule; precise concentricity; apex offset < 50 µm Repeatability ≤ 0.2 dB over 1,000 mating cycles Operating Temp. -40 °C to +85 °C Storage Temp. -40 °C to +85 °C

products.title: D‑Link Smart Managed PoE Switch, Model DGS-1210-28P
products.subtitle: D‑Link 28‑port Gigabit Smart Managed PoE+ Switch (model DGS‑1210‑28P) featuring 24 PoE ports with a 193 W PoE budget, ideal for powering IP cameras, VoIP phones, and access points, with advanced L2 switching and Web UI
products.description: Product Definition The DGS-1210-28P by D-Link is a Smart Managed PoE+ Gigabit switch featuring 24 PoE ports plus 4 combo RJ45/SFP Gigabit ports. It delivers up to 193 W PoE budget and includes advanced L2 switching, surveillance and voice VLAN modes, IPv6 support, and robust security features. Primary Use Cases Powering and managing PoE devices such as IP cameras, VoIP phones, and wireless access points. Surveillance deployments using dedicated Surveillance Mode or Auto Voice VLAN for video and voice traffic segregation. Enterprise-grade network setups with VLANs, QoS, and static routing capabilities. Ease of management via a Web UI, with optional centralized control through Nuclias Connect. Usage Warnings Do not exceed the total PoE budget (193 W) when connecting high-power devices. Avoid operating in high-temperature environments without proper cooling to ensure longevity. Maintain secure configurations (VLAN, ACLs) to prevent unauthorized access. Backup configurations before firmware updates or factory resets. Technical Specifications Specification Details PoE RJ45 Ports 24 ports (PoE+, IEEE 802.3af/at) Combo SFP/RJ45 Ports 4 Gigabit combo ports PoE Budget 193 W Switching Capability Layer 2 + Static Routing (L2+) Management Options Web UI (Standard/Surveillance Mode), CLI, SNMP, optional Nuclias Connect Security Features ACLs, 802.1X/RADIUS, ARP spoofing prevention, Safeguard Engine Special VLAN Features Auto Voice VLAN, Surveillance VLAN Energy Saving Technology D-Link Green 3.0, Energy Efficient Ethernet, Time-based PoE IPv6 Support Yes Warranty D-Link Lifetime Warranty upon registration

products.title: D-Link Switch 24-Port Gigabit Unmanaged
products.subtitle: The D-Link DGS-1024C is a 24-Port Gigabit Unmanaged Switch designed as a cost-effective solution for Small-to-Medium Businesses (SMBs) and home offices. It offers a simple way to expand your wired network capacity significantly with high-speed connections and "plug-and-play" simplicity.
products.description: D-Link 24-Port Gigabit Unmanaged Switch DGS-1024C The DGS-1024C is the ultimate economical, "plug-and-play" networking solution for SOHO and small-to-medium businesses. It allows you to expand your network instantly, providing 24 dedicated Gigabit ports to eliminate bottlenecks and ensure every connected device—from servers to workstations—operates at peak performance. Key Features Plug-and-Play Simplicity: No configuration or software required. Just plug in your Ethernet cables and you're ready to go. Full Gigabit Performance: 24 ports of 10/100/1000 Mbps connectivity provide a massive total switching capacity of 48 Gbps . Reliable Data Transfer: Supports 802. 3x Flow Control to minimize dropped packets, ensuring a more reliable connection for all your connected devices. D-Link Green Technology: Automatically powers down ports that aren't in use and optimizes power usage based on cable length, saving on energy costs without sacrificing speed. Sleek & Sturdy: Housed in a durable metal casing, this switch is designed for a long service life and can be easily mounted in a standard 19-inch rack. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Port Count 24 x 10/100/1000 Mbps Ports Switching Capacity 48 Gbps Forwarding Mode Store-and-Forward MAC Address Table 8K Entries Housing Metal (Rackmountable) Auto-MDI/MDIX Yes (No need for crossover cables)

products.title: Dell Vostro 15 3530 Ci5 1334U 8GB 512GB
products.subtitle: A business-class laptop featuring 13th-gen Intel processors, 8 GB RAM, 512 GB NVMe SSD, and a 15.6″ FHD 120 Hz display.
products.description: Product Overview The Dell Vostro 15 3530 is a balanced business laptop offering reliable performance with 13th-gen Intel processors, a 15.6″ FHD 120 Hz panel, ideal for professional and educational use. Key Uses Efficient multitasking and business applications Video conferencing with HD camera and quality audio Fast storage and upgradable RAM for heavier workloads Diverse connectivity including HDMI, USB-A, USB-C, SD, and optional RJ-45 Usage Warnings Use the original 65 W power adapter to prevent power issues Cooling may be challenged under sustained load—ensure proper ventilation BIOS updates are recommended for optimal performance and stability Technical Specifications Specification Details Processor Intel Core i5-1335U (10-Core, up to 4.60 GHz, 12 MB Cache) Memory 8 GB DDR4 (upgradeable up to 16 GB via dual slots) Storage 512 GB PCIe NVMe SSD (M.2 2280) Display 15.6″ Full HD IPS, 120 Hz Graphics Intel Iris Xe Graphics (integrated) Ports USB 3.2 Gen-1 ×1, USB 2.0 ×1, USB-C 3.2 Gen-1 ×1 (with DP/PD on aluminum models), HDMI 1.4, RJ-45, SD card reader, Combo audio jack Wireless WLAN 802.11ac or ax (model dependent), Bluetooth 5 Battery 3-cell 41 Wh or 4-cell 54 Wh with ExpressCharge Weight Approximately 1.63-1.66 kg

products.title: Dell Vostro 3520 i3‑1215U
products.subtitle: A practical and efficient laptop featuring a 12th Gen Intel Core i3‑1215U (6 cores/8 threads, up to 4.4 GHz), 4 GB DDR4 RAM, 256 GB M.2 NVMe SSD, integrated Intel UHD graphics, and a 15.6″ FHD display (60 or 120 Hz depending on configuration). Ideal for everyday office tasks and student use.
products.description: Introducing the Dell Vostro 3520 with Intel Core i3-1215U A business-oriented laptop offering reliable performance and balanced specs at a competitive price. Product Overview Equipped with a 12th Gen Intel Core i3-1215U (6 cores/8 threads, up to 4.4 GHz, 10 MB cache), 4 GB DDR4 RAM, and a 256 GB M.2 NVMe SSD for smooth everyday productivity. Ideal For Web browsing and office applications. Video conferencing and distance learning. Light multitasking and typical business tasks. Usage Warnings Memory (4 GB) can be upgraded if better multitasking performance is needed. Not intended for demanding gaming or heavy creative workloads. products.subtitle: The Dell Vostro 3530 is an essential productivity laptop designed for professionals and students who need reliable performance at an excellent value. Powered by the 13th Gen Intel Core i3-1305U processor, this laptop is perfectly balanced for everyday office tasks, web browsing, and virtual learning.
products.description: Product DescriptionThe Dell Vostro 15-3530 is a reliable, everyday business laptop powered by an Intel Core i3-1305U, 8 GB RAM, and 512 GB SSD, delivering smooth and efficient performance. Key Uses Office productivity and document editing. Web browsing and video conferencing. Light media playback and storage. products.title: DP722 Grandstream mid-tier DECT cordless IP phone , 10 SIP accounts and 10 lines,1.8 inch color LCD
products.subtitle: The Grandstream DP722 is a mid-tier DECT Cordless IP Phone designed for mobile business users and warehouse environments. It pairs with Grandstream’s DP750, DP752, or DP755 base stations to offer a mix of mobility and high-end telephony features.
products.description: Description DP722 Description The DP722 is a mid-tier DECT cordless IP phone that allows users to mobilize their VoIP network throughout any business, warehouse, retail store and residential environment. It is supported by Grandstream’s DP750 and DP752 DECT VoIP base stations and delivers a combination of mobility and excellent telephony performance. Up to five DP722 handsets to be supported on each base station while each DP722 supports a range of up to 350 meters outdoors (with DP752) and 50 meters indoors, 20 hours of talk time and 250-hour standby time. It touts a suite of robust features including support for up to 10 SIP accounts per handset, full HD audio, 1.8 inch color display, a 3.5mm headset jack, push-to-talk, a speakerphone and more. When paired with Grandstream’s DECT Base Stations, the DP722 offers an affordable mid-range cordless DECT solution for any business or residential user. Features Supports a range of up to 350 meters outdoors and 50 meters indoors when used with the DP752 (300 meters outdoors when used with DP750) 1.8 inch (128×160) color LCD with 2 programmable soft keys Offers 20 hours talk time and 250 hours standby time Supports up to 10 SIP accounts and 10 lines per handset as well as 3-way conferencing Push-to-talk via a configurable button Seamless 1-touch door control with Grandstream’s GDS series of Facility Access devices HD audio on the speakerphone, handset, and headset jack Software and firmware updates over-the-air Show More Show Less

products.title: DP752 Grandstream powerful DECT VoIP base station
products.subtitle: The Grandstream DP752 is a high-performance DECT VoIP Base Station that allows you to create a mobile cordless phone system for your office or home. It acts as the "hub" that connects your cordless handsets to your internet phone service (VoIP).
products.description: Description DP752 Description The DP752 is a powerful DECT VoIP base station that pairs with up to 5 of Grandstream’s DP series DECT handsets to offer mobility to business and residential users. It supports outdoor range of up to 400 meters with the DP730 or up to 350 meters with DP722/DP720 as well as indoor range up to 50 meters to give users the freedom to move around their work or home. This DECT VoIP base station supports up to 10 SIP accounts and 5 concurrent calls while also offering 3-way voice conferencing, full HD audio and integrated PoE. A shared SIP account on all handsets will add seamless unifed features that gives users the ability to answer all calls regardless of location in real-time. The DP752 supports a variety of auto-provisioning methods and TLS/SRTP/HTTPS encryption security. When paired with Grandstream’s DP720, DP722 or DP730 handsets, the DP752 offers a powerful cordless DECT solution for any business or residential user. Features Pairs with up to 5 of Grandstream’s DP series DECT handsets via instant pairing using a dedicated pairing button Up to 10 SIP accounts per system; up to 10 lines per handset Support outdoor range of up to 400 meters with the DP730 or up to 350 meters with DP722/DP720 as well as indoor range up to 50 meters Supports Push-to-Talk and activity based on proximity and accelerometer sensors Automated provisioning options include TR-069 and XML config files Show More Show Less

products.title: Ethernet Cable Cat6 UTP 23AWG LSZH 305M Gray
products.subtitle: Ethernet Cable Cat6 UTP 23AWG Solid Bare Copper Wire, 250MHz, Unshieled 305M Roll LSZH Gray Jacket
products.description: Product Overview The Netsys Cat6 series is engineered to exceed standard networking requirements. Built with 23 AWG solid copper conductors , it provides superior conductivity and tensile strength compared to standard cables. The LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) outer jacket ensures that in the event of a fire, smoke emission is minimal and toxic fumes are eliminated—making it compliant with strict building safety regulations. Key Features Gigabit Performance: Supports frequencies up to 250 MHz , delivering stable Gigabit Ethernet (10/100/1000Mbps) performance. Safety First (LSZH): The Low Smoke Zero Halogen jacket is essential for installations in public spaces, high-rise buildings, and poorly ventilated areas. Enhanced PoE Support: The thicker 23 AWG wire gauge reduces heat buildup and resistance, making it perfect for Power over Ethernet (PoE, PoE+, and PoE++) applications like IP cameras and Access Points. Internal Spline: Features a central cross-filler to maintain pair geometry, significantly reducing Near-End Crosstalk (NEXT) and interference. Installation Friendly: Packaged in a reinforced 305m (1000ft) easy-pull box for snag-free dispensing and accurate measurement. Technical Specifications Feature Details Cable Type Category 6 (Cat6) UTP Conductor Material 23 AWG Solid Bare Copper Jacket Rating LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) Max Frequency 250 MHz Length 305m / 1000ft Color Gray Compliance ISO/IEC 11801, TIA/EIA 568-C.2, RoHS

products.title: Face Plate, 70 × 115, Shutter, 1-Port, white
products.subtitle: Face Plate, US type, 70 × 115, With Shutter, Single Port, and labeling plate, White
products.description: The Netsys NS-FP70115-SH-1P is a high-quality single-port fiber optic faceplate designed for rectangular mounting applications, adhering to standard single-gang dimensions common in North American and specific international markets. Measuring 70x115mm , this model provides a professional and secure termination point for Fiber-to-the-Home (FTTH) and business enterprise environments where a sleek, vertical profile is required. Key Features Single-Port Streamlined Design (1P): Optimized for single-service deployments, providing a clean and dedicated termination point for one fiber connection (SC Simplex or LC Duplex). Integrated Spring-Loaded Shutter (SH): Features a built-in dust shutter that automatically snaps shut when the patch cord is removed. This prevents debris from entering the adapter and protects users from accidental exposure to harmful laser radiation. Standard 70x115mm Form Factor: Specifically designed to fit standard rectangular single-gang electrical back boxes, ensuring a perfect flush-mount installation in modern infrastructure. Optimal Fiber Protection: The internal housing is engineered to manage fiber slack and maintain the necessary bend radius, ensuring peak signal performance and preventing micro-bends in the glass. High-Impact Construction: Manufactured from flame-retardant, UV-stabilized ABS plastic, ensuring the faceplate remains durable and retains its professional white finish over time. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-FP70115-SH-1P Port Count 1 Port Dimensions 70mm x 115mm (Single Gang) Protection Internal Spring-Loaded Safety Shutter Adapter Compatibility Fits 1x SC Simplex or 1x LC Duplex Adapter Material Flame-Retardant ABS Plastic Color Signal White Best Use Case The NS-FP70115-SH-1P is ideal for Residential FTTH Subscriber Terminations where a single fiber link is needed for an internet router. It is also an excellent choice for Commercial Office Fit-outs that utilize rectangular wall boxes, providing a secure and aesthetically pleasing fiber-to-the-desk connection point.

products.title: Face Plate, 70 × 115, Shutter, 2-Port, white
products.subtitle: Face Plate, US type, 70 × 115, With Shutter, Double Port, and labeling plate, White
products.description: The Netsys NS-FP70115-SH-2P is a premium dual-port fiber optic faceplate designed specifically for rectangular mounting environments, commonly found in North American and specific European cabling standards. Measuring 70x115mm , this model is engineered to provide a sleek, high-density termination point for high-speed fiber deployments in modern office buildings and residential complexes. Key Features Dual-Port High Density (2P): Features two dedicated ports to accommodate fiber adapters (SC Simplex or LC Duplex), enabling multi-service delivery or redundant network paths from a single wall outlet. Integrated Protective Shutters (SH): Both ports are equipped with spring-loaded dust shutters. These provide a critical barrier against environmental contaminants and ensure laser safety by automatically blocking the light path when a patch cord is disconnected. Rectangular Form Factor (70x115mm): The vertical rectangular design is tailored for compatibility with standard single-gang electrical boxes, offering a professional flush-mount finish. Angled or Flush Entry: Designed to manage fiber exit angles effectively, reducing the physical protrusion of patch cords and protecting the minimum bend radius of internal fibers to prevent signal loss. Industrial-Grade Construction: Molded from high-quality, UV-resistant, and flame-retardant ABS plastic to maintain its structural integrity and color over long-term use. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-FP70115-SH-2P Port Count 2 Ports Dimensions 70mm x 115mm (Single Gang) Protection Dual Spring-Loaded Safety Shutters Compatibility SC Simplex / LC Duplex Adapters Material High-Impact, Flame-Retardant ABS Color Classic White Best Use Case The NS-FP70115-SH-2P is the ideal solution for Enterprise Fiber-to-the-Desk (FTTD) applications where users require both a primary and a backup network connection. It is also highly suited for Luxury Residential Projects that utilize rectangular electrical standards, providing a centralized point for high-speed internet and IPTV services via a single, organized wall plate.

products.title: Face Plate, 86*86, Shutter, 1-Port, white
products.subtitle: Face Plate, Right Angle, 86×86, With Shutter, Single Port, and Labeling Plate, White
products.description: The Netsys NS-FP8686-SH-1P is a high-quality, single-port fiber optic wall outlet (Faceplate) specifically engineered for clean and efficient fiber termination in Fiber-to-the-Home (FTTH), Fiber-to-the-Desk (FTTD), and commercial office environments. This model combines a compact footprint with essential safety features to ensure long-term network reliability. Key Features Single-Port Configuration (1P): Optimized for streamlined, single-connection setups, making it the perfect termination point for individual subscriber lines or dedicated workstation links. Integrated Dust Shutter (SH): Equipped with a spring-loaded internal shutter that automatically closes when no patch cord is present. This protects the internal connector from dust and debris while shielding users from direct laser exposure. Universal 86x86mm Design: Adheres to the standard international 86mm square form factor, allowing for easy installation into existing electrical wall boxes and mounting frames. Safe Bend Radius Management: The internal architecture is designed to guide fiber pigtails smoothly, ensuring the glass fiber never exceeds its minimum bend radius, which prevents signal attenuation and breakage. Premium Material: Built from flame-retardant, high-impact ABS plastic, providing a sleek white finish that blends into modern residential and professional interiors. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-FP8686-SH-1P Port Count 1 Port Dimensions 86mm x 86mm Protection Automatic Spring-Loaded Dust Shutter Adapter Compatibility Fits 1x SC Simplex or 1x LC Duplex Adapter Material Flame-Retardant ABS Installation Wall-mounted (Flush or Surface) Best Use Case The NS-FP8686-SH-1P is the go-to solution for standard FTTH residential drops where only one main connection is required to feed an internet router or ONT. It is also highly effective for hospital and educational environments where dust protection and safety shutters are mandatory to prevent tampering or contamination of the optical link.

products.title: Face Plate, 86*86, Shutter, 2-Port, white
products.subtitle: Face Plate, Right Angle, 86×86, With Shutter, Double Port, and Labeling Plate, White
products.description: The Netsys NS-FP8686-SH-2P is a professional-grade, dual-port fiber optic wall outlet (Faceplate) designed to provide a clean and secure termination point for fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) or enterprise network deployments. Its standard 86x86mm square design ensures compatibility with most international electrical back boxes, making it a staple for structured cabling. Key Features Dual-Port Capacity (2P): Designed to house up to two fiber adapters (typically SC Simplex or LC Duplex), allowing for redundant links or separate service connections. Shuttered Design (SH): Features integrated spring-loaded dust shutters that protect the internal connectors from contaminants and prevent accidental eye exposure to laser light when no patch cord is connected. Standard 86mm Form Factor: The "8686" designation refers to its classic 86mm x 86mm dimensions, ensuring it fits flush against walls in offices, residential units, or data rooms. Internal Fiber Management: Engineered with sufficient internal space to maintain the minimum bend radius of fiber pigtails, preventing signal loss or glass breakage. Durable Material: Constructed from high-impact, flame-retardant ABS plastic for long-term durability and a professional aesthetic finish. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-FP8686-SH-2P Ports 2 Ports (Vertical or Angled depending on specific insert) Dimensions 86mm x 86mm Protection Built-in Dust Shutters Compatibility SC Simplex / LC Duplex Adapters Material ABS Plastic (Flame Retardant) Color Signal White (Standard) Best Use Case The NS-FP8686-SH-2P is ideal for FTTH (Fiber to the Home) installations where a subscriber's ONT (Optical Network Terminal) needs to be connected to the incoming service provider line. It is also widely used in Modern Office Workstations to provide direct-to-desk fiber connectivity for high-security or high-bandwidth environments.
