products.title: Huawei eSFP-GE-SX-MM850 Optical Transceiver
products.subtitle: 1 Gbps optical transceiver module, 850 nm wavelength, supports multimode fiber up to 550 meters, with LC connector.
products.description: Huawei eSFP-GE-SX-MM850 Optical Transceiver Module The Huawei eSFP-GE-SX-MM850 is a reliable and efficient solution for expanding Gigabit Ethernet networks over multimode fiber. With its compact eSFP design and support for the 1000BASE-SX standard, this module offers high performance and compatibility with a wide range of Huawei switches and routers. Key Applications: Data Center Networks Enterprise LANs Storage Area Networks (SANs) Device interconnections over multimode fiber Usage Warnings: Ensure compatibility with the target device. Use high-quality multimode fiber cables. Do not exceed the maximum specified distance to maintain stable performance. Technical Specifications: Specification Value Form Factor eSFP Speed 1 Gbps Wavelength 850 nm Fiber Type Multimode (MMF) Connector LC Maximum Distance 550 m (OM2) Operating Temperature 0°C to 70°C Part Number 02315204

Console cable Indicators and Buttons Figure 4-33 Indicators on the Switch The S310-24P4X model is used as an example. Non-PoE models do not have PoE indicator and PoE mode. Table 4-97 Description of indicators on the switch No. Indicator Name Color Status Description 1 PWR Power module indicator - Off The switch is powered off. Green Steady on The power supply is normal. Yellow Steady on The power supply is abnormal. 2 SYS System status indicator - Off The system is not running. Green Fast blinking The system is starting. Green Steady on During the system startup preparation phase, the SYS indicator is steady green, which lasts for a maximum of 30 seconds. Green Slow blinking The system is running normally. Red Steady on The system does not work normally after registration, or a fan alarm or a temperature alarm has been generated. 3 MST Stack indicator - Off If you are not changing the indicator mode (default): The switch is a standby or slave switch in a stack or the stacking function is not enabled on the switch. If you are changing the indicator mode: The stack mode is not selected. Green Steady on The stack mode is selected. The switch is a standby or slave switch in a stack, and the service port indicators show the stack ID of the switch. Green Blinking If you are not changing the indicator mode (default): The switch is the master switch in a stack or a standalone switch with the stacking function enabled. If you are changing the indicator mode: The stack mode is selected. The switch is the master switch in a stack or a standalone switch, and the service port indicators show the stack ID of the master switch. After 45 seconds, the service port indicators automatically restore to the status mode. 4 PoE PoE indicator - Off The PoE mode is not selected. Green Steady on The PoE mode is selected, and service port indicators show the PoE status of each port. 5 MODE Mode switch button - - When you press this button once, the service port indicators change to the stack mode and show the stack ID of the local switch. When you press this button a second time, the service port indicators change to the PoE mode and show the PoE status of each service port. When you press this button a third time, the service port indicators restore to the default mode and show the connection status and link activity of each service port. If you do not press the MODE button within 45 seconds, the service port indicators restore to the default mode. In this case, the PoE indicator is off. NOTE: Hold down the mode switch button for 6s and release it to start the web initial login mode. Either of the following situations will occur: If the switch has no configuration file, the system attempts to enter the web initial login mode.If the system enters the web initial login mode successfully, the MST mode indicator turns green and stays on for a maximum of 45 seconds. If the login fails, check whether the device uses factory default settings. 6 - Service port indicator (one indicator for each port) Arrowheads show the positions of ports. A down arrowhead indicates a port at the bottom, and an up arrowhead indicates a port at the top. Meanings of service port indicators vary in different modes. For details, see Table 4-98 . NOTE: If a power failure occurs on a device's PCB board, indicators of the last four GE or 10GE optical ports on the device's front panel blink green cyclically at an interval of 1 second, with each indicator illuminating for 0.25 seconds. 7 CLOUD Cloud indicator NOTE: In versions earlier than V600R024C00, this indicator is reserved. - Off The device is not connected to the cloud. Blue Fast blinking The device is connecting to the cloud. Blue Slow blinking The device is in the cloud management state. Table 4-98 Description of service port indicators in different modes (one indicator for each port) Display Mode Color Status Description Default mode - Off The port is not connected or has been shut down. Green Steady on A link has been established on the port. Green Blinking The port is sending or receiving data. MST stack mode - Off Port indicators do not show the stack ID of the switch. Green Steady on The switch is not the master switch in a stack. If the indicator of a port is steady on, the number of this port is the stack ID of the switch. Green Blinking The switch is the master switch in a stack. If the indicator of a port is blinking, the number of this port is the stack ID of the switch. PoE mode - Off The port is not providing power to a powered device (PD). Green Steady on The port is providing power to a PD. Green Blinking The power of the PD connected to the port exceeds the power capacity of the port or the power threshold configured on the port. Alternatively, the PD does not comply with IEEE standards.

products.title: Huawei USG6000E-S13-AC Next-Generation Firewall
products.subtitle: The Huawei HiSecEngine USG6000E-S13-AC is a high-performance, next-generation firewall (NGFW) designed for small to medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and branch offices. It provides comprehensive security protection by integrating traditional firewalling with advanced AI-driven threat detection to defend against complex cyberattacks.
products.description: Overview Table 2-8 Basic information about the USG6000E-S13 Description Part Number Model First supported version USG6000E-S13-AC Host(2*GE RJ45 + 8*GE COMBO + 2*10GE SFP+,1 AC power,Include SSL VPN 100 Users) 02355YXM USG6000E-S13-AC V600R007C20SPC605 Appearance Figure 2-7 Appearance of the USG6000E-S13 (front view) Figure 2-8 Appearance of the USG6000E-S13 (rear view) Components Figure 2-9 Components of the USG6000E-S13 1. Product series ID 2. Indicator and button area 3. Fixed interface area 4. Protective ground terminal 5. MAC label 6. SN label 7. Fan module 8. Optional power module slot 9. Power module - Table 2-9 Component functions Name Description Product series ID Indicates the product series of the device. For details about the product model, see the nameplate in the lower part of the device. Indicator and button area Provides multiple indicators to display the running status of the device in real time and provides the RST button for emergency maintenance. Fixed interface area Provides service ports, USB ports, console ports, and out-of-band management ports for device configuration and maintenance. Protective ground terminal Connects the M4 OT terminal of a PGND cable to the cabinet or the ground bar in the equipment room. MAC label Uniquely identifies the MAC address of the device, which is required during network forwarding configuration. SN label Uniquely identifies the device, which needs to be provided for the local technical support personnel to apply for a license. Fan module Dissipates heat for the device and is swappable. The fan module can be removed for no more than 1 minute. The slot number of the fan module is 4. Power module Provides power input and distribution for the device. One power module is included in the standard configuration. Two power modules can be configured to achieve 1+1 power redundancy. When one power module is running properly, the other one is hot swappable. The silkscreens of the power module slots are PWR1 and PWR2, and the corresponding slot numbers are 2 and 3 respectively. Indicators and Buttons Figure 2-10 Indicators and buttons on the USG6000E-S13 1. PWR, SYS, USB, HA, WAN and CLOUD indicators 2. GE electrical port ACT indicator 3. GE electrical port LINK indicator 4. Optical port ACT indicator 5. Optical port LINK indicator 6. MGMT port indicator 7. RST button - - - Arrowheads of optical ports show the positions of the ports. A down arrowhead indicates a port in the upper part, and an up arrowhead indicates a port in the lower part. products.title: ISW-514PTF Planet Industrial DIN-Rail Unmanaged POE Switch
products.subtitle: Industrial 4-Port 10/100TX 802.3at PoE+ plus 1-Port 100FX Ethernet Switch
products.description: Description ISW-514PTF A Perfect Full PoE+ Power Solution Ideal for Hardened Environment With Plug and Play design, PLANET ISW-514PTF Industrial-grade, DIN-rail type Unmanaged Fast Ethernet PoE+ Switch, featuring 4 IEEE 802.3at PoE+10/100BASE-TX ports and 1 additional 100BASE-FX fiber optic interface for uplink connection, allows to automatically detect and configure internal and external peripherals. With rugged IP40 metal housing and redundant power system for total power budget of up to 120 watts for different kinds of PoE applications, the ISW-514PTF also operates efficiently in harsh environments, with an operating temperature range of -40 to 75 degrees Celsius. In response to the growing demand for IIoT (Industrial Internet of Things) infrastructure, the ISW-514PTF is designed for easy deployment of industrial networks with its Plug and Play capability. Furthermore, it ensures stable and reliable fast data and power transmission. The ISW-514PTF also supports PROFINET traffic pass-through with QoS, making it an ideal choice for integrating with industrial automation systems and enhancing communication between devices in a factory setting. PROFINET Traffic Pass-through with QoS The ISW-514PTF features a brand-new function that enhances support for recognizing the PROFINET traffic for higher delivery priority. Once the ISW-514PTF receives the PROFINET traffic, it will forward the PROFINET traffic first, and then handle other Ethernet traffic. With this enhanced function, the ISW-514PTF will become the ideal Industrial Unmanaged Switch for the faster PROFINET traffic. Industrial-grade PoE+ Switch for Building Automation and Security Suitable for buildings where security is strictly enforced, the ISW-514PTF, with four Fast Ethernet 802.3at PoE+ in-line power interfaces, can easily build a power centrally controlled for an IP phone system, IP surveillance system, and wireless AP group in the harsh Industrial environment. For instance, 4 PoE IP cameras or PoE wireless APs can be easily installed for surveillance demands or a wireless roaming environment in the industrial area can be built. Without the power-socket limitation, the ISW-514PTF makes the installation of IP cameras or wireless APs easier and more efficient. Perfect Integration Solution for IP PoE Camera and NVR System The ISW-514PTF provides four 10/100BASE-TX 802.3at PoE+ ports which can offer sufficient PoE power to 4 PoE IP cameras at the same time. In addition, with the 100BASE-FX interfaces, the ISW-514PTF can connect to a core fiber switch and send video streams to an NVR and monitoring center. Through the high-performance switch architecture, the ISW-514PTF facilitates the recorded video files from the 4 PoE+ IP cameras to be saved in the NVR systems. Furthermore, the NVR systems can be controlled and monitored in both the local LAN and the remote site via Internet. The ISW-514PTF undoubtedly brings an ideal secure surveillance system at a lower total cost. ISW-514PTF Key Features Physical Port 4 10/100BASE-TX Fast Ethernet IEEE 802.3at PoE+ RJ45 copper ports (Ports 1 to 4) 1 100BASE-FX SFP interface Power over Ethernet Complies with IEEE 802.3at Power over Ethernet Plus, end-span PSE Backward compatible with IEEE 802.3af Power over Ethernet Up to 4 ports of IEEE 802.3af/at devices powered Up to 120-watt PoE budget Supports PoE power up to 36 watts for each PoE port Each port supports 54V DC power to PoE powered device Auto detects powered device (PD) Circuit protection prevents power interference between ports Remote power feeding up to 100m in standard mode with 250m in extend mode Switching Hardware-based 10/100Mbps (half/full duplex), auto-negotiation and auto MDI/MDI-X Features Store-and-Forward mode with wire-speed filtering and forwarding rates PROFINET traffic pass-through with QoS IEEE 802.3x flow control for full duplex operation and back pressure for half duplex operation 1K MAC address table size IEEE 802.1Q VLAN transparency Hardware DIP switch for Standard, VLAN and Extend mode selection; the Extend mode features 25-watt PoE transmission distance of 250m at speed of 10Mbps (Only for Ports 1 to 4) Automatic address learning and address aging Industrial Case and Installation IP40 metal case DIN-rail, wall-mount design or side wall-mount design One terminal block for master and slave power input (Power Range: 12 ~54V DC redundant power) 12~54V DC redundant power with reverse polarity protection Fault alarm for power input failed 4 real-time PoE power usage indicators Supports 5KV DC Ethernet ESD protection -40 to 75 degrees C operating temperature ISW-514PTF Hardware Specifications Copper Ports Four 10/100BASE-TX RJ45 auto-MDI/MDI-X ports (Ports 1 to 4) PoE Injector Ports Four ports with 802.3af/at PoE+ injector function (Ports 1 to 4) SFP Port One port 100BASE-FX SFP port Connector Removable 6-pin terminal block Pin 1/2 for Power 1 *Pin 3/4 for power fault alarm Pin 5/6 for Power 2 DIP Switch (Ports 1 to 4) Standard mode: 30-watt PoE transmission distance of 100m at speed of 10/100Mbps VLAN mode: “Port-based VLAN Protection” where ports can be isolated from each other via one DIP switch. products.title: JL684B HPE Aruba Networking Instant On Switch 24p Gigabit CL4, PoE, 4p SFP+ 370W, 1930 Series
products.subtitle: The Aruba Instant On 1930 24G Class4 PoE 4SFP/SFP+ (JL684B) is an advanced, smart-managed Gigabit switch designed for small and growing businesses. Part of the Aruba Instant On portfolio, it combines enterprise-grade performance with "anywhere, anytime" cloud management, making it an ideal choice for power-hungry devices like Wi-Fi 6 access points and PTZ security cameras.
products.description: Description JL684B Aruba Instant On 1930 switch series The Aruba Instant On 1930 switch series is designed for small and growing businesses that require enhanced performance to support bandwidth-demanding applications. The Aruba Instant On 1930 switch series seamlessly integrates with existing Instant On indoor/outdoor access points and can be centrally managed with the Instant On mobile app onsite or remotely. These cloud-managed layer 2+ Ethernet switches consist of 8-, 24-, and 48-port Class 4 PoE (i.e. PoE+) and non-PoE Gigabit Ethernet models, with 1G SFP slots on 8-port model and 1G/10G SFP+ slots on 24-/48G models for fiber connectivity. Seven advanced smart managed Layer 2+ Gigabit switches for high-performance connectivity. Non-PoE and Class 4 PoE (i.e. PoE+) 8-, 24- and 48-port models for deployment flexibility. 1G/10G SFP+ ports on 24-and 48-port models for fiber connectivity. Aruba Instant On mobile app and/or cloud-based web portal for easy network management onsite or remotely. Option to manage your switches through local web GUI. Limited Lifetime Warranty. JL684B Features Simplify Network Deployment and Management for Small Organizations The Aruba Instant On 1930 switch series features easy-to-use, out-of-the-box, plug-and-play deployment. The series offers a complete portfolio of choices for increased small business Data sheet flexibility. It consists of seven models including 8G-, 24G-, and 48G-ports with and without class 4 PoE (i.e. PoE+). The 24- and 48- port models include four SFP/SFP+ transceiver slots that support Gigabit or 10-Gigabit speeds for fiber connectivity. The Aruba Instant On 1930 switch series can be deployed using two management modes – Instant On cloud-management (access via mobile app and/or web portal) and the local web GUI. Keep Your Business Protected with Integrated Security Features The Aruba Instant On 1930 switch series supports energy efficient Ethernet for lower power consumption and an enhanced feature set for more robust operation. Enhanced security features such as IEEE 802.1x, and VLANs guard your network from unwanted or unauthorized access. Automatic denial-of-service (DOS) monitors and protects the network against malicious attacks. Management security restricts access to critical configuration commands, offers multiple privilege levels with password protection. Deliver High Performance The Aruba Instant On 1930 switch series delivers advanced functionalities including customizable like VLANs, link aggregation, Spanning Tree Protocols, and IEEE 802.1X access control. 8-, 24-, and 48-port configurations with a choice of non-PoE and Class 4 PoE models provides deployment flexibility that fits all small business environment. Class4 PoE options allow to power devices like IP phones, surveillance cameras and access points, without the cost of additional cabling. The 24- and 48-port models include 1G/10G SFP+ ports for reliable fiber connectivity and other connections across longer distances. The switch series is covered by the Limited Lifetime Warranty with 24×7 phone support for 90 days and chat support for the entire warranty duration. Show More Show Less

Usage Warnings: Ensure the run does not exceed 1 meter to avoid signal attenuation if a longer length is required. Avoid sharp bends or heavy pressure, especially near connectors, which may damage internal wires. Not suitable for very high temperature or humid environments without additional protection. LSZH helps with smoke and halogen emission reduction but does not replace robust protection in harsh industrial conditions. products.title: Mercusys MW302R 300Mbps Multi-Mode Wireless N Router
products.subtitle: The Mercusys MW302R is an affordable and versatile N300 Wireless Router designed to provide fast, stable Wi-Fi for everyday home networking. Featuring a "4-in-1" design, it can easily adapt to different networking needs, whether you need a primary router, a signal booster, or an access point.
products.description: Mercusys MW302R 300Mbps Multi-Mode Wireless N Router Reliable, High-Speed Wi-Fi for Your Daily Digital Life The Mercusys MW302R is designed to deliver a stable and fast wireless experience. With speeds of up to 300Mbps , it’s the perfect choice for essential home networking needs, including HD video streaming, online gaming, and fast file downloads. Its compact and elegant design ensures it fits perfectly in any room. Product Highlights: Strong, Extended Coverage: Equipped with two external 5dBi high-gain antennas , the MW302R boosts signal reception and sensitivity, providing broad Wi-Fi coverage across your home. 4-In-1 Multi-Mode Versatility: One device, four ways to connect! Choose the mode that fits your needs: → Router Mode: Creates a wireless network for all your devices. → Range Extender Mode: Expands your existing Wi-Fi coverage. → Access Point Mode: Transforms a wired network into a wireless one. → WISP Mode: Wirelessly connects to the ISP network in areas without wired service. Easy 3-Step Installation: No professional help needed! The intuitive web interface guides you through the setup process in minutes. Advanced Security & Control: * Parental Controls: Manage when and how connected devices access the internet. → Guest Network: Keeps your main network secure by providing a separate access point for visitors. Smooth IPTV Experience: Supports IGMP Proxy/Snooping, Bridge, and Tag VLAN to optimize your IPTV streaming for a lag-free experience. Technical Specifications: Wireless Speed: 300Mbps on the 2.4GHz band. Antennas: 2× Fixed 5dBi Omni-Directional Antennas. Ethernet Ports: 2× 10/100Mbps LAN Ports & 1× 10/100Mbps WAN Port. Dimensions: 114 × 94 × 26 mm.

products.description: NETSYS Cat6A SFTP Ethernet Cable 23AWG LSZH 305M NS-106ASFTP-305GR-L The NETSYS NS-106ASFTP-305GR-L is a professional-grade Category 6A (Cat6A) cable engineered to support high-speed data transfer up to 10Gbps over 100 meters. Featuring a robust SFTP (Shielded Foiled Twisted Pair) construction, it provides maximum protection against electromagnetic interference (EMI) and crosstalk, making it ideal for data centers, industrial facilities, and high-density office environments. Key Technical Specifications Feature Specification Category Cat6A (Augmented Category 6) Conductor Gauge 23 AWG Solid Bare Copper Shielding Type SFTP (Overall Braid Shield + Individual Foil Shields) Jacket Material LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) Length 305 Meters (1,000 ft) Color Gray Bandwidth Up to 500 MHz Data Rate Up to 10 Gbps Core Advantages Superior Shielding (SFTP): Each pair is wrapped in foil, and the entire core is covered in a tinned copper braid. This dual-layer shielding is the "gold standard" for eliminating noise in high-interference areas. LSZH Safety Rating: In the event of a fire, the Low Smoke Zero Halogen jacket emits limited smoke and no toxic halogens, protecting personnel and sensitive equipment in poorly ventilated spaces. 23 AWG Solid Copper: The thicker gauge conductor ensures lower resistance and better performance for Power over Ethernet (PoE/PoE+/PoE++) applications compared to thinner alternatives. Future-Proofing: Supports frequencies up to 500 MHz, ensuring your infrastructure is ready for the next generation of networking hardware. Applications Data Centers: High-density 10GBASE-T links. Industrial Environments: Areas with heavy machinery or electrical interference. Institutional Buildings: Schools, hospitals, and government offices where LSZH safety compliance is mandatory.

products.title: Netsys  Cat6A UTP LSZH Patch Cord 1M Gray
products.subtitle: Patch Cord Cat6A UTP 550Mhz 23AWG 50um Gold Platted Contacts 1M LSZH Gray Jacket
products.description: Netsys Cat6A UTP LSZH Patch Cord 1M Gray NS-106AUTP-GR-1M Future-proof your network with 10Gbps performance and enhanced signal integrity. The NS-106AUTP-GR-1M is engineered to support the most demanding data center and server room applications. By utilizing Augmented UTP technology , this cable effectively suppresses Alien Crosstalk (AXT), ensuring stable data transmission even when bundled tightly with other cables. Its 1-meter length is the industry standard for clean, efficient patching within server racks. Key Features 10-Gigabit Performance: Fully compliant with Cat6A standards, supporting data transfer speeds up to 10 Gbps and a massive bandwidth of 550 MHz . LSZH Jacket: The Low Smoke Zero Halogen jacket ensures that in the event of a fire, the cable emits limited smoke and no toxic halogens, making it safe for use in poorly ventilated areas. Augmented UTP Technology: Specially designed internal geometry reduces interference and crosstalk, maintaining high signal quality over 10GBASE-T networks. Premium Construction: Features 23AWG/24AWG pure copper conductors and 50μm gold-plated contacts for superior conductivity and resistance to corrosion. Snagless Design: The molded snagless boot protects the RJ45 locking tab from breaking during installation or maintenance in crowded patch panels. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-106AUTP-GR-1M Category Category 6A (Cat6A) Type UTP (Unshielded Twisted Pair) Length 1.0 Meter Color Gray (GR) Bandwidth Tested up to 550 MHz Data Rate Up to 10 Gbps Jacket Material LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) Conductor Stranded Pure Copper Ideal Applications Data Centers: Perfect for connecting high-speed switches, servers, and Storage Area Networks (SANs). Enterprise Networking: High-performance backbone connections for modern office infrastructures. High-Density Patching: Use in server racks to minimize cable clutter and improve airflow.

products.title: Netsys Ethernet Cable Cat6 SFTP 23AWG LSZH 305M Gray
products.subtitle: Ethernet Cable Cat6 SF/UTP 4 Pairs 23AWG Solid Bare Copper Wire, 250MHz, Shieled 305M Roll LSZH Gray Jacke
products.description: Product Overview The NS-106SFTP-305GR-L is a high-performance, industrial-grade Cat6A cable designed for high-speed data environments. Featuring S/FTP (Shielded/Foiled Twisted Pair) construction, this cable provides superior protection against electromagnetic interference (EMI) and crosstalk, making it the ideal choice for data centers, server rooms, and areas with high electrical noise. With a length of 305 meters (1000ft) and a Low Smoke Zero Halogen ( LSZH ) jacket, it combines top-tier performance with stringent safety standards for indoor installations. Key Features Superior Shielding: S/FTP design (individual foil shielding for each pair plus an overall braid shield) ensures maximum signal integrity and eliminates Alien Crosstalk (AXT). 10Gbps Performance: Fully supports 10GBASE-T Ethernet speeds at frequencies up to 500 MHz . LSZH Rated Jacket: The Low Smoke Zero Halogen outer sheath reduces the risk of toxic gas emissions during a fire, complying with modern building safety regulations. Pure Copper Conductors: Built with high-quality solid bare copper for better conductivity and PoE (Power over Ethernet) support compared to CCA alternatives. Convenient Packaging: Supplied on a sturdy wooden or heavy-duty plastic reel for smooth, tangle-free dispensing during large-scale deployments. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model Number NS-106SFTP-305GR-L Category Cat6A (Augmented Category 6) Shielding Type S/FTP (Shielded Foiled Twisted Pair) Length 305m / 1000ft Jacket Material LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) Color Gray (GR) Max Frequency 500 MHz Data Rate Up to 10 Gbps Conductor Type Solid Bare Copper Applications Enterprise Networks: High-speed backbone cabling for corporate offices. Data Centers: Reliable 10Gbps links between servers and switches. Industrial Environments: Shielded protection for areas near heavy machinery or power lines. Safety-Critical Zones: LSZH jacket makes it suitable for public buildings, hospitals, and poorly ventilated areas. Note: For optimal performance, ensure all termination hardware (jacks, patches, and plugs) are also Cat6A Shielded rated to maintain the integrity of the ground.

products.title: Netsys Ethernet Cable Cat6A SFTP 23AWG LSZH 500M Gray
products.subtitle: Ethernet Cable Cat6A SF/UTP 4 Pairs 23AWG Solid Bare Copper Wire, 500MHz, Unshieled 500M Roll LSZH Gray Jacket
products.description: Netsys NS-106ASFTP-500GR-L | Cat6A S/FTP Shielded 10Gbps Bulk Cable (500m / 1640ft) Product Overview The Netsys NS-106ASFTP-500GR-L is a premium-tier networking solution engineered for high-density environments requiring maximum bandwidth and uncompromising signal security. This Category 6A cable features S/FTP (Shielded/Foiled Twisted Pair) architecture, providing the highest level of protection against Electromagnetic Interference (EMI) and Radio Frequency Interference (RFI). With a generous 500-meter length and a Low Smoke Zero Halogen (LSZH) jacket, this cable is specifically designed for large-scale infrastructure projects, data centers, and government installations where safety and performance are paramount. Key Features Dual-Layer Shielding: Each individual pair is wrapped in foil, supplemented by an overall tinned copper braid shield to virtually eliminate "Alien Crosstalk" and external noise. 10-Gigabit Capacity: Optimized for 10GBASE-T applications, supporting frequencies up to 500 MHz over the full 100-meter channel. LSZH Safety Rated: The Low Smoke Zero Halogen jacket ensures that in the event of a fire, smoke emission is minimal and contains no toxic halogens—essential for public buildings and high-occupancy areas. Precision Manufacturing: Features high-purity solid copper conductors for superior electrical performance and full compatibility with PoE, PoE+, and PoE++ (Power over Ethernet) devices. Extended 500m Bulk Reel: Reduced waste and fewer joins on large-scale pulls compared to standard 305m boxes. Technical Specifications Specification Details Brand Netsys Model NS-106ASFTP-500GR-L Cable Category Cat6A (Augmented) Shielding S/FTP (Individual Foil + Overall Braid) Length 500 Meters (1640 Feet) Color Gray (GR) Jacket Type LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) Conductor Material Solid Bare Copper Performance Standard ANSI/TIA-568.2-D & ISO/IEC 11801 Ideal Use Cases Advanced Data Centers: Perfect for 10Gbps switch-to-server interconnects. Medical & Laboratories: Shielded protection for environments with sensitive electronic equipment. High-Rise & Public Infrastructure: Complies with fire safety standards for airports, schools, and malls. Smart Building Automation: Robust enough to power and connect high-output PoE lighting and security systems.

products.title: Netsys Fiber Patch Cord 3m LC-LC Duplex OM2
products.subtitle: LC-UPC to LC-UPC Duplex Fiber Optic Patch Cable - 50/125µm Multi mode OM2 - 3mm Orange LSZH Jacket - 3 Meters in Total Length
products.description: Netsys Fiber Patch Cord 3m LC-LC Duplex OM2 Multimode NS-LCUPC-LCUPC-DX-OM2-3M The dependable choice for high-speed local area networks and short-reach fiber links. The NS-LCUPC-LCUPC-DX-OM2-3M is built to support Gigabit speeds (1000Base-SX) over distances up to 550 meters. With its precision-engineered LC/UPC connectors , this 3-meter cable ensures low insertion loss and high return loss, making it a staple for server rooms and telecommunication closets that require consistent, error-free data flow. Key Features OM2 Multimode Performance: Optimized for 1Gbps (Gigabit) applications and capable of supporting 10Gbps over shorter distances (up to 82 meters). LC to LC Connectors: Small Form Factor (SFF) connectors allow for high-density patching in modern networking equipment where space is at a premium. UPC (Ultra Physical Contact) Polish: The connectors are polished to a superior finish to ensure maximum signal contact and minimum back-reflection. Duplex Zipcord Design: Two fibers joined by a removable clip allow for simultaneous send and receive (bi-directional) data transmission. LSZH Safety Jacket: The Low Smoke Zero Halogen outer jacket is flame-retardant and emits non-toxic fumes in case of fire, meeting strict building safety codes. Tested Reliability: Each cable is factory-tested for insertion loss to ensure it meets or exceeds industry standards before reaching your network. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-LCUPC-LCUPC-DX-OM2-3M Fiber Mode Multimode OM2 (50/125 $μm$ ) Connectors LC to LC (Duplex) Polish Type UPC to UPC Length 3 Meters Jacket Color Orange (Standard OM2 Coding) Insertion Loss $\leq$ 0.30 dB Return Loss $\geq$ 30 dB Jacket Material LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen)

products.title: Netsys Fiber Patch Cord LC-LC Duplex Multimode OM4 3m
products.subtitle: LC-UPC to LC-UPC Duplex Fiber Optic Patch Cable - 50/125µm Multi mode OM4 - 3mm Orange LSZH Jacket - 3 Meters in Total Length
products.description: Netsys Fiber Patch Cord LC-LC Duplex Multimode OM4 3m NS-LCUPC-LCUPC-DX-OM4-3M Maximize your network throughput with laser-optimized OM4 performance. The NS-LCUPC-LCUPC-DX -OM4-3M is engineered to support high-speed data transfer over longer distances than standard OM3 cables. Featuring high-quality LC/UPC connectors , this 3-meter duplex cable ensures minimal signal loss (Insertion Loss) and high return loss, providing a stable and reliable connection for your most critical network hardware. Key Features OM4 Ultra-High Bandwidth: Optimized for 40Gbps and 100Gbps applications (40GBASE-SR4/100GBASE-SR10) and fully backward compatible with OM3 and OM2 hardware. UPC Polished Connectors: The Ultra Physical Contact (UPC) polish ensures a superior surface finish, significantly reducing back-reflection for a cleaner signal. Duplex Configuration: Two fiber strands in a single zip-cord jacket allow for simultaneous bi-directional data communication. Extended Reach: Supports 10Gbps transmission up to 550 meters and 40/100Gbps up to 150 meters, offering more flexibility than OM3. Durable LSZH Jacket: Built with a Low Smoke Zero Halogen jacket, making it safe for use in data centers, schools, and offices by reducing toxic fume emission in case of fire. Precision Ferrule: High-quality ceramic ferrules ensure precise alignment and long-term durability over hundreds of matings. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-LCUPC-LCUPC-DX-OM4-3M Fiber Mode Multimode OM4 (50/125 $μm$ ) Connectors LC to LC (Duplex) Polish Type UPC to UPC Length 3 Meters Jacket Color Erika Violet (Standard OM4 Coding) Insertion Loss $\leq$ 0.30 dB Return Loss $\geq$ 35 dB Jacket Material LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) Ideal Applications High-Speed Data Centers: Perfect for connecting 40G/100G switches and transceivers (QSFP+, SFP28). Fiber to the Enclosure: Ideal for internal patching within the Netsys 32U Server Rack or high-density fiber trays. Storage Area Networks (SAN): Provides the low-latency, high-bandwidth connection required for modern storage solutions.

products.title: Outdoor Fiber Optic Cable, Steel Armored 4 Core SM 9/125 GYXTW
products.subtitle: Fiber cable, 4core, Outdoor, Armored, PE, Jelly filled, GYXTW, SM 9/125 (G652D) 9.0mm words engrave on the cable-blue color line
products.description: The Netsys NS-401SM004 is a high-performance 4-core Single Mode (OS2) outdoor fiber optic cable featuring a rugged GYXTW central loose tube construction. Designed for demanding outdoor environments, this cable is steel-armored to provide superior mechanical protection and moisture resistance for long-distance data transmission. Key Features 4-Core OS2 Single Mode: Utilizes 9/125μm (G652D) fiber cores, optimized for high-bandwidth, long-haul telecommunications and data networking with minimal signal attenuation. Steel Armored (PSP): Wrapped with a longitudinal corrugated steel tape (PSP) that provides excellent crush resistance and acts as a barrier against rodents and mechanical impact. Weather-Resistant Construction: The fibers are housed in a high-modulus plastic loose tube filled with a water-resistant jelly compound , then encased in a durable, UV-resistant High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) outer jacket. Enhanced Tensile Strength: Features two parallel steel wires placed on opposite sides of the steel tape, ensuring the cable can withstand significant pulling force during installation. Compact & Lightweight: The GYXTW design offers a small diameter (approx. 9. 0mm), making it easier to handle and install in ducts or aerial applications compared to traditional multi-tube cables. Hydrolysis Resistance: The high-strength loose tube is specially designed to resist hydrolysis, protecting the delicate glass fibers from moisture-related degradation over time. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Fiber Count 4 Cores Fiber Type Single Mode OS2 (9/125μm) G652D Cable Structure GYXTW (Central Loose Tube) Armoring Corrugated Steel Tape (PSP) Outer Jacket HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene) Water Blocking Jelly Filled Tube + Water-blocking material Outer Diameter ~9.0 mm Static Bending Radius 10 x Cable Diameter Dynamic Bending Radius 20 x Cable Diameter Best Use Case The NS-401SM004 is specifically engineered for outdoor campus backbones, municipal networks, and inter-building links . Its armored design makes it suitable for both duct installations and direct burial (with proper preparation), as well as aerial lashing where environmental protection and physical durability are required.

products.title: Patch Cord LC-LC APC Single Mode DX 3M
products.subtitle: LC-APC to LC-APC Duplex Fiber Optic Patch Cable - 9/125µm Single mode OS2 - 3mm Yellow LSZH Jacket - 3 Meters in Total Length
products.description: The Netsys NS-LCAPC-LCAPC-DX-SM-3M is a high-precision Single-mode (OS2) Duplex Fiber Optic Patch Cord designed for ultra-reliable, long-distance data transmission. At 3 meters (approx. 10 feet) , this cable features LC/APC to LC/APC connectors, making it the industry standard for high-performance telecommunications and FTTX (Fiber to the X) applications. Key Features Angled Physical Contact (APC) Polish: Both ends feature green LC connectors with an 8-degree angled polish . This design significantly reduces back reflection ( Return Loss ≥ 65dB ), which is critical for sensitive high-speed video, CATV, and long-haul fiber networks. Single-mode OS2 Fiber: Utilizes a 9/125µm core , optimized for the 1310nm and 1550nm wavelengths. 1 This allows for nearly unlimited bandwidth and extremely low attenuation over much longer distances than multimode fiber. 2 Duplex Configuration: Two fiber strands joined in a single "zipcord" style jacket allow for simultaneous bi-directional data transfer (transmit and receive). Low Insertion Loss: Precision-manufactured ceramic ferrules ensure an insertion loss of ≤ 0.3dB , maintaining maximum signal strength across the connection. LSZH Jacket: The yellow Low Smoke Zero Halogen jacket is safer for indoor environments, emitting limited smoke and no toxic halogens if exposed to high heat or fire. 3 Technical Specifications Feature Specification Fiber Type Single-mode OS2 (9/125µm) Connectors LC/APC to LC/APC (Duplex) Length 3.0 Meters (approx. 9.8 feet) Jacket Color Yellow (Standard for Single-mode) Return Loss ≥ 65 dB Insertion Loss ≤ 0.3 dB Jacket Material LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) Best Use Case The NS-LCAPC-LCAPC-DX-SM-3M is best suited for Carrier-grade networks and GPON/EPON installations . Because of the APC polish, it is specifically required for equipment that is sensitive to back-reflection, such as high-speed internet backbone switches and fiber-to-the-home distribution points. 4 Note: APC connectors are not compatible with standard blue UPC connectors. 5 Plugging an APC (green) connector into a UPC (blue) port will cause high signal loss and potentially damage the fiber faces. 6

products.title: Planet GTP-805A-EU Media Converter
products.subtitle: The GTP-805A-EU is more than just a media converter; it is a power delivery powerhouse. It converts 1000Base-X fiber (via an SFP slot) to 10/100/1000Base-T copper , while simultaneously providing up to 30 Watts of PoE+ power to connected devices. With its flexible SFP port, you can customize the fiber distance based on the SFP transceiver used (Single Mode or Multimode), making it an essential tool for large-scale campus or industrial networks.
products.description: Description GTP-805A-EU The Combination of PoE PD and Gigabit Ethernet Distance Extension Since the Gigabit RJ45 port of the GT-805A-PD provides PoE PD power in-line interface, the GT-805A-PD can obtain PoE power from any 802.3af/at/bt PoE PSE equipment, which reduces the reliance on electrical outlets. The GT-805A-PD directly converts the media from the Gigabit fiber to twisted-pair interface. For example, it can be applied between the Gigabit Fiber Switch and the Gigabit Copper Network Card to perform media conversion and transmission. With the conversion, you can easily have the transmission distance of Gigabit copper cable extended up to 550 meters or longer (depending on SFP module). Built in with one single SFP port, the GT-805A-PD can integrate with the existing copper switch to provide Gigabit fiber transmission without the need of replacing with the Gigabit Fiber Switch. With the Gigabit fiber transmission, the GT-805A-PD enables video stream to be delivered from the camera located in a distance of up to 120km to local Network Video Recorder. Fiber-Optic Networking for ISPs, System Integrators, Enterprises and Homes With superb data transmission and easy installation, the GT-805A-PD can be used to build an ISP network of FTTH (Fiber to the Home), FTTC (Fiber to the Curb) or FTTB (Fiber to the Building). The GT-805A-PD is also ideal for small office network environment for enterprises. Show More Show Less

products.title: Planet IKVM-210-08 8-Port Combo IP KVM Switch
products.subtitle: The IKVM-210-08 is an enterprise-grade 8-port IP-based KVM switch that allows network administrators to monitor and control up to eight servers locally or from anywhere in the world via a standard web browser. Designed for high-density server rooms, this 1U rack-mountable device digitizes video, keyboard, and mouse signals to provide secure, real-time remote management without the need for additional software licenses.
products.description: Description IKVM-210-08 Hardware 1U rack-mount size and desktop design Standalone machine controls up to 8 sets of computers Up to 2 levels can be cascaded and up to 64 computers can be controlled Front panel status LEDs give a clear indication of the active computers Security Two-layer password security protection DES, AES and 3DES for data encryption Management Auto scan mode for monitoring computers Requires no additional software or hardware Computer selection via Port Select Button, Hotkey and On Screen Display (OSD) Hot pluggable: Add or remove computers without having to power down the switch QVS (Quick View Setting): Quickly select your computer by naming its model or serial number Remote Access Remotely control PC via TCP/IP and a built-in 10/100/1000Mbps Ethernet port High Video Quality: Resolution up to 2048 x 1536 (local side) or 1920 x 1080 (remote side) Sends the key combinations to a remote computer Administrator and multiple users with password protection Use of the absolute synchronistical technology of mouse to ensure the accuracy of the Windows operating system Expedient bandwidth control Compatibility Multiplatform support — Windows, Linux and Sun Multibrowser support (IE, Chrome, Firefox) Supports Microsoft Intellimouse, Logitech Net Mouse and other third-party’s PS/2 mice Remote Management via Network With PLANET IKVM-210-08, network administrators can control a server room locally or remotely through Internet. No additional software or license fee is needed; multiple users can securely access remote server by using a standard web browser to create an HTTP connection. Cascade Operation The IKVM-210-08 is easy to install for controlling up to 8 computers/servers. Furthermore, eight KVM switches can be cascaded to enable to control up to 64 servers. Show More Show Less

Rapid Toolless Installation: The integrated hinged cap provides the necessary leverage to terminate all 8 wires simultaneously, significantly reducing labor time and installer fatigue. 3 Enhanced Signal Integrity: High-performance internal circuitry minimizes Cross-talk (NEXT) and Return Loss, ensuring your network runs at peak Gigabit speeds. Gold-Plated Contacts: Features 50-micron gold plating on the contact pins to prevent oxidation and maintain a reliable connection over thousands of insertion cycles. Versatile Compatibility: The standard keystone footprint snaps easily into ProLink wall plates, surface-mount boxes, and blank patch panels. products.description: Product Overview The HPE Aruba R2H25A (AP-505) is a high-performance, cost-effective Wi-Fi 6 (802. 11ax) access point designed for medium-density environments such as schools, retail branches, and offices. By utilizing Aruba's advanced feature set, the AP-505 delivers high-speed wireless connectivity with improved efficiency, providing a seamless experience for mobile and IoT-heavy environments. As a Unified Access Point , it can operate in either controller-based (AOS) or controller-less (Instant) modes. Key Features Next-Gen Wi-Fi 6 Performance: Supports the 802. 11ax standard, including features like OFDMA and Bi-directional MU-MIMO, which allow multiple clients to be handled simultaneously with minimal latency. Dual-Radio Throughput: Delivers a combined maximum data rate of 1.49 Gbps (1. 2 Gbps in the 5GHz band and 287 Mbps in the 2. 4GHz band). WPA3 and Enhanced Open: Features the latest Wi-Fi security standards to provide stronger encryption and protection for guest and enterprise traffic. IoT Ready: Built-in Bluetooth 5 and Zigbee radios simplify the deployment and management of IoT-based location services, asset tracking, and sensor networks. AirMatch & ClientMatch: Aruba’s patented technology automatically optimizes the RF environment and intelligently steers clients to the best available radio for consistent performance. Energy Efficient: Includes Green AP mode, allowing the access point to save power when data demand is low. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Brand HPE Aruba Model Number R2H25A (AP-505) Standard Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) - Dual Radio MIMO 2x2:2 MU-MIMO Data Rate 5GHz: Up to 1.2 Gbps / 2.4GHz: Up to 287 Mbps Antenna Integrated Down-tilt Omni-directional Ethernet Port 1 x 10/100/1000Base-T (RJ-45) USB Port 1 x USB 2.0 (Type A) for IoT devices Power Input PoE (802.3af) or DC (12V) Mounting Ceiling/Wall (Brackets sold separately) Applications Corporate Offices: Reliable, high-speed Wi-Fi for mobile workforces and video conferencing. Educational Institutions: High-density classroom connectivity for digital learning. Retail Branches: Secure guest Wi-Fi and IoT integration for inventory or location-based marketing. Small to Mid-sized Businesses: Enterprise-grade security and performance at an accessible price point.

products.description: Product Overview The NS-504SOR32U6012 is a heavy-duty 32U server cabinet designed to house and secure high-density server, storage, and networking equipment. Engineered with a depth of 1200mm , this rack is specifically built to accommodate extra-long modern servers while providing ample space for structured cabling and power management. Its robust steel construction and optimized airflow design make it the ideal backbone for enterprise data centers and server rooms. Key Features High-Density Cooling: Features perforated front and rear doors to maximize airflow, ensuring that high-performance servers maintain optimal operating temperatures. Extended 1200mm Depth: Designed for deep-chassis servers and specialized hardware, providing extra room for cable management and PDU (Power Distribution Unit) installation. Heavy-Duty Load Capacity: Constructed from high-quality cold-rolled steel, capable of supporting heavy rack-mount equipment without structural compromise. Secure Access: Lockable front and rear doors along with removable side panels provide both high security and easy 360-degree access for maintenance. Integrated Cable Management: Multiple cable entry points at the top and bottom with brush strips to keep the internal environment clean and dust-free. Mobility & Stability: Equipped with heavy-duty casters for easy positioning and leveling feet to secure the cabinet in a permanent location. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Rack Units 32U Width 600 mm Depth 1200 mm Height Approx. 1600 mm (with casters) Material SPCC Cold Rolled Steel Door Type Perforated (Hexagonal Pattern) Front & Rear Side Panels Removable, Lockable Color Black (Powder Coated) Mounting Rail 19-inch Standard (Adjustable depth) Loading Capacity Up to 800 kg (Static Load) Applications Enterprise Data Centers: Ideal for housing blade servers and high-capacity storage arrays. Network Hubs: Centralized management for large-scale fiber optic and copper switches. Co-location Facilities: Secure, standard-compliant housing for multi-tenant environments. Industrial Labs: Rugged protection for testing and measurement equipment.

products.subtitle: The APC Easy UPS SRV3KI is a high-performance, double-conversion online UPS designed to provide essential power protection for the most unstable power conditions. This 3000VA unit ensures that your critical hardware—from servers and voice/data networks to light industrial manufacturing—receives a pure sine wave and zero transfer time during power fluctuations.
products.description: APC Easy UPS On-Line SRV3KI (3000VA/2400W) The SRV3KI is a professional-grade model from APC by Schneider Electric , a high-quality Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) designed to protect IT infrastructure and sensitive equipment. Thanks to its Double-Conversion On-Line technology, this device ensures the delivery of pure and perfectly stable power, regardless of the quality of the incoming electricity from the source. Product Overview Capacity: 3000 VA / 2400 Watts. Technology: On-Line Double-Conversion with zero transfer time (0ms) during power outages. Waveform: Pure Sine Wave to protect motors and sensitive electronic devices. Display: Intuitive LCD screen providing accurate real-time information on power and battery status. Ideal Applications Medium and large servers and computer networks. Small data centers and technology rooms (MDF/IDF). Telecommunications equipment and professional audio systems. Sensitive medical and laboratory devices. Smart Management: Supports APC power management software for remote monitoring and safe system shutdown. Eco-Mode: Provides very high operating efficiency to reduce energy consumption when the grid quality is stable. Robust Design: Built to withstand the harshest electrical conditions while providing superior frequency and voltage stability. Box Contents UPS Unit SRV3KI. Main power cable. USB management cable. RS-232 cable. User manual.

products.title: TAPO AI Home Security Wi-Fi Camera C125
products.subtitle: The Tapo C125 is a premium indoor security camera that combines high-performance imaging with a sleek, compact design. Featuring a physical privacy shutter and advanced AI features, it is designed for users who prioritize both smart security and personal privacy. With its ultra-wide viewing angle and 2K QHD resolution, it provides superior coverage and clarity for any room.
products.description: Tapo C125 | AI Home Security Wi-Fi Camera The TP-Link Tapo C125 is a premium, compact indoor security camera that blends high-end imaging with advanced artificial intelligence. Featuring 2K QHD resolution and a specialized ultra-wide-angle lens , it is designed for those who want a wider field of view and smarter detection without the need for a pan/tilt mechanism. With its sleek design and enhanced privacy features, it fits perfectly into any modern smart home. Key Features 2K QHD + AI Clarity: Delivers 4MP (2560 × 1440) high-resolution video, providing 1.7× more detail than standard 1080p. Every image is sharp, making it easier to see fine details. 140° Ultra-Wide Field of View: The wide-angle lens allows you to cover more area with a single camera, making it ideal for large rooms, open-plan living areas, or wide hallways. Advanced AI Detection & Notifications: Smart AI identifies people, pets, and vehicles while also detecting abnormal sounds like glass breaking or a baby crying. Receive specific notifications so you know exactly what is happening. Physical Privacy Shutter: For ultimate peace of mind, the C125 features a physical privacy shutter that can be activated via the app, ensuring the camera is completely blocked when you are at home. Dual-Light Night Vision: Equipped with 850nm IR LEDs for discreet night vision up to 30 feet , plus the ability to switch to visible white light for color images in low-light conditions. Smart Interaction: * Two-Way Audio: High-fidelity microphone and speaker for clear communication. Voice Control: Works seamlessly with Apple HomeKit, Amazon Alexa, and Google Assistant. Flexible Storage: Choose between secure local storage on a microSD card (up to 512 GB ) or Tapo Care cloud services. Technical Specifications Feature Details Video Resolution 2K QHD (4MP) Field of View 140° (Diagonal) AI Detection Person, Pet, Vehicle, Sound, Gesture Privacy Physical Privacy Shutter Night Vision 850nm IR LED up to 30 ft Wireless 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi Storage MicroSD Card Slot (Up to 512 GB) Smart Home Apple HomeKit, Alexa, Google Assistant

Perfect for users who want sharper image quality than standard HD without the bulk, it provides smart AI-driven features and reliable 24/7 protection for your home, office, or nursery. products.title: Tapo Indoor/Outdoor Wi-Fi Home Security Camera C120
products.subtitle: The Tapo C120 is a versatile, high-performance security camera designed to guard both the inside and outside of your home. With its IP66 weatherproofing and compact design, it offers flexible installation options while delivering stunning 2K QHD resolution. Whether mounted on a wall or placed on a shelf, the C120 provides professional-grade clarity and smart AI features to keep your property safe 24/7.
products.description: Tapo C120 | Indoor/Outdoor 2K QHD Security Wi-Fi Camera The TP-Link Tapo C125 is a versatile, high-performance security camera designed to guard both the inside and outside of your home. Combining 2K QHD resolution with a weather-resistant design, it offers flexible installation options and advanced AI features. Whether mounted on an exterior wall or placed on a shelf inside, the C120 provides professional-grade surveillance in a compact, modern form. Key Features 2K QHD (4MP) Crystal Clear Video: Captures images at 2560 × 1440 resolution, providing 1.7× more detail than standard 1080p. This ensures that faces and license plates are clearly visible even when digitally zoomed. Indoor & Outdoor Versatility: With an IP66 weather-resistant rating, the C120 is built to withstand rain, dust, and extreme temperatures, making it just as effective on your porch as it is in your living room. Starlight Color Night Vision: Equipped with a high-sensitivity Starlight Sensor and built-in dual spotlights, the camera captures full-color video even in low-light conditions. Free Smart AI Detection: Integrated AI identifies people, pets, and vehicles without the need for a subscription. It also recognizes abnormal sounds like a baby crying, a dog barking, or a glass breaking. With its adjustable output voltage , it can power a wide variety of devices such as non-PoE IP cameras, wireless access points, and VoIP phones.

products.title: TL-SG3210 JetStream 8-Port Gigabit L2+ Managed Switch with 2 SFP Slots
products.subtitle: The TL-SG3210 is a fully managed Layer 2+ switch equipped with 8 Gigabit RJ45 ports and 2 Gigabit SFP slots for high-speed fiber uplinks. Beyond standard switching, it offers a robust suite of security features, enterprise-level QoS, and advanced L2+ routing. As part of the Omada Software Defined Networking (SDN) platform, this switch can be centrally managed via the cloud, providing a highly scalable and efficient network controlled from a single interface.

Static Routing : Helps route internal traffic for more efficient use of network resources. Robust Security Strategies : IP-MAC-Port Binding, ACL, Port Security, DoS Defend, Storm control, DHCP Snooping, 802.1X, Radius Authentication, and more. products.title: TL-WN722N 150Mbps High Gain Wireless N USB Adapter
products.subtitle: 150Mbps High Gain Wireless USB Adapter with detachable external antenna for enhanced signal strength.
products.description: Product Definition: The TL-WN722N 150Mbps High Gain Wireless N USB Adapter allows you to connect your desktop or notebook computer to a wireless network and access high-speed Internet connection. Complying with IEEE 802.11n, it provides wireless speed up to 150Mbps, which is beneficial for online gaming or even video streaming. Key Features Connect to Wi-Fi networks at speeds up to 150Mbps. High gain external antenna for enhanced signal strength. WPS button for easy wireless security encryption. Usage Warnings Ensure system compatibility before installation. Do not disconnect the adapter during updates or installation. Technical Specifications Specification Details Interface USB 2.0 Wireless Standards IEEE 802.11b/g/n Frequency 2.4~2.4835GHz Signal Rate 150Mbps at 2.4GHz Antenna Detachable Omni Directional (RP-SMA) Dimensions 93.5 × 26 × 11 mm Supported OS Windows XP/7/8/8.1/10, Mac OS 10.6-10.11, Linux

products.title: TL-WN823N 300Mbps Mini Wireless N USB Adapter
products.subtitle: The TL-WN823N is a 300Mbps Mini Wireless N USB Adapter designed to connect your laptop or desktop to a high-speed wireless network. With its "Mini" design, this adapter is slightly larger than a USB flash drive, making it highly portable and ideal for travel or for keeping your workspace clutter-free. Despite its size, it delivers fast 300Mbps speeds—perfect for lag-free HD video streaming, online gaming, and VoIP calls.
products.description: Key Features High-Speed Wi-Fi: Provides speeds of up to 300Mbps , offering a stable and fast connection for daily internet activities and media-heavy tasks. 4 Miniature Design: Its sleek, compact form factor ensures it won't block adjacent USB ports when plugged into your computer. SoftAP Mode: Easily turn your wired internet connection on a PC or Laptop into a Wi-Fi hotspot for other mobile devices. 5 One-Button Security (WPS): Features a dedicated WPS button, allowing you to establish a secure wireless connection instantly with a single push. 6 Stable Connection: Equipped with internal antennas that provide enhanced reception and transmission stability compared to standard built-in laptop receivers. Broad Compatibility: Supports Windows (11/10/8.1/8/7/XP), Mac OS, and Linux. 7 Technical Specifications Feature Specification Interface USB 2.0 Wireless Speed Up to 300 Mbps Frequency 2.400~2.4835 GHz Wireless Standards IEEE 802.11b, IEEE 802.11g, IEEE 802.11n Security 64/128-bit WEP, WPA/WPA2, WPA-PSK/WPA2-PSK Antenna Type Internal Dimensions 39 x 18.35 x 7.87 mm Certification CE, FCC, RoHS Applications Desktop Wi-Fi Upgrade: Quickly add wireless capability to a desktop PC without opening the case or installing internal cards. Laptop Repair: A cost-effective solution for laptops with broken or weak internal Wi-Fi cards. On-the-Go Connectivity: The perfect travel companion for business professionals needing a reliable connection in hotels or cafes. Home Office: Ensure a stable 300Mbps link for video conferencing and large file downloads. 8

products.title: TP-LIN AC1200 Wireless MU-MIMO Gigabit Router Archer C6
products.subtitle: The TP-Link Archer C6 is an ideal choice for high-speed home networking, creating a reliable and blazing-fast network powered by 802.11ac Wi-Fi technology. With its powerful chipset and sleek design, it delivers smooth performance for everyday tasks like HD streaming and lag-free online gaming.
products.description: TP-Link Archer C6 | AC1200 Wireless MU-MIMO Gigabit Router The Archer C6 creates a reliable and blazing-fast network powered by 802.11ac Wi-Fi technology. The 2.4 GHz band delivers speeds up to 300 Mbps , perfect for everyday tasks like emailing and web browsing, while the 5 GHz band delivers up to 867 Mbps , ideal for HD video streaming and lag-free online gaming. Key Features AC1200 Dual-Band Wi-Fi: Simultaneous 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz connections for a flexible and high-speed wireless experience. MU-MIMO Technology: Transfers data to multiple devices at once for 2× faster performance, reducing wait times and increasing Wi-Fi throughput. Boosted Coverage: Four external antennas equipped with Beamforming technology extend wireless signals to every corner of your home. Gigabit Connectivity: With one Gigabit WAN port and four Gigabit LAN ports, speeds can be up to 10× faster than standard Ethernet connections. Access Point Mode: Supports AP Mode to transform your existing wired connection into a private wireless network. Technical Specifications Feature Details Wi-Fi Speeds 867 Mbps (5 GHz) + 300 Mbps (2.4 GHz) Antennas 4 × Fixed High-Performance External Antennas Ethernet Ports 1 × Gigabit WAN Port, 4 × Gigabit LAN Ports Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3, WPA/WPA2-Enterprise (802.1x) Dimensions 215 × 117 × 32 mm

products.title: TP-Link 10-Port Gigabit Desktop Switch with 8-Port PoE+
products.subtitle: Unmanaged 10-port Gigabit switch with 8 PoE+ ports delivering up to 123W total power, ideal for surveillance and access points.
products.description: TP-Link TL-SG1210MP Switch - Professional Performance for Your Network The TL-SG1210MP from TP-Link is an unmanaged switch featuring 10 Gigabit ports, including 8 PoE+ ports that deliver both data and power over a single cable. With a total power budget of 123W, this switch is ideal for powering IP cameras, access points, and VoIP phones. Key Applications: IP Surveillance Cameras Wireless Access Points VoIP Phones Computers and Printers Usage Warnings: Ensure the total power consumption does not exceed 123W to maintain optimal performance. In Extend Mode, transmission speed reduces to 10 Mbps for distances up to 250 meters. Use high-quality cables to ensure the best performance. Technical Specifications: Ports 9× Gigabit RJ45 + 1× Combo SFP/RJ45 PoE+ Ports 8 ports (up to 30W per port) Total PoE Power 123W Extend Mode Up to 250m at 10 Mbps Priority Mode Gives priority to ports 1 and 2 Isolation Mode Separates traffic between ports for enhanced security PoE Auto Recovery Automatically reboots unresponsive connected devices Cooling Fanless design for silent operation Dimensions 209 × 126 × 26 mm Weight 1.41 kg

products.title: TP-LINK 10-Port Gigabit Desktop Switch with 8-Port PoE+ LS1210GP
products.subtitle: The TP-Link LS1210GP is a high-performance Gigabit unmanaged switch designed to provide a robust backbone for your business or home network. Combining high-speed data transfer with powerful PoE+ capabilities and a dedicated fiber uplink, it is the perfect solution for deploying IP cameras, wireless access points, and high-speed workstations across a large area.
products.description: LS1210GP | 10-Port Gigabit Desktop Switch with 8-Port PoE+ The TP-Link LS1210GP is a high-performance member of the LiteWave series, designed to bring Gigabit speeds and high-power PoE capabilities to your home or small business network. With 8 dedicated PoE+ ports and specialized uplink options, it offers a robust solution for expanding your network with high-speed, reliable connectivity for power-hungry devices. Key Features Full Gigabit Performance: Features 9× Gigabit RJ45 ports and 1× Gigabit SFP slot , providing high-speed data transfers and flexible fiber uplink options for long-distance connectivity. 8-Port PoE+ Power: All 8 Gigabit RJ45 ports support the 802.3af/at standards, delivering up to 30W per port to power IP cameras, access points, and VoIP phones. 61W Total PoE Budget: A total power budget of 61W ensures efficient power distribution for your essential network equipment. Long-Range PoE (Up to 250m): Switch to Extend Mode to deliver data and power to devices up to 250 meters away, making it perfect for surveillance setups in large facilities. Enhanced Security & Performance: * Isolation Mode: Secure your network by isolating traffic on ports 1–8 with one click to prevent tampering and broadcast storms. Priority Mode: Guarantees the quality of sensitive applications like video and voice by prioritizing ports 1–2. PoE Auto Recovery: Features a "Self-Healing" mechanism that automatically detects and reboots unresponsive PoE-powered devices, ensuring constant uptime. Silent & Green: The fanless design ensures silent operation, while TP-Link’s Green technology adjusts power consumption based on link status and cable length. Technical Specifications Feature Details Interface 9× 10/100/1000Mbps RJ45 Ports 1× Gigabit SFP Slot PoE Ports Ports 1–8 (802.3af/at) PoE Power Budget 61 W Switching Capacity 20 Gbps Transmission Distance Up to 250m (in Extend Mode) Advanced Functions Extend Mode, Priority Mode, Isolation Mode, PoE Auto Recovery

products.title: TP‑Link 10-Port Gigabit Desktop Switch with 8-Port PoE+ TL-SG1210P
products.subtitle: An unmanaged gigabit network switch featuring 10 ports, including 8 PoE+ ports to power devices through the same Ethernet cable
products.description: Product Description The TL-SG1210P is an unmanaged PoE+ switch from TP-Link featuring 10 ports—including 8 PoE+ ports, 1 standard RJ45 port, and 1 SFP slot. It delivers data and power over a single cable, reducing infrastructure costs. Key Applications Powering IP surveillance cameras. Feeding wireless access points. Supporting IP phones. Network expansion in offices, classrooms, or workspaces. Usage Warnings Ensure total PoE draw doesn’t exceed 63 W; lower-priority ports will be shut off if exceeded. Do not open or modify the unit to avoid safety hazards. Use only the original power adapter (53.5 V/1.31 A). Avoid high humidity or extreme heat environments to maintain device performance. Technical Specifications Table Specification Details Type Unmanaged Switch Ports 8 × PoE+ 10/100/1000 Mbps + 1 × RJ45 + 1 × SFP PoE Standard IEEE 802.3af/at, up to 30 W per port, total 63 W Switching Capacity 20 Gbps Forwarding Rate 14.88 Mpps QoS 802.1p / DSCP Flow Control IEEE 802.3x IGMP Snooping Yes Special Features Extend Mode (up to 250 m), Priority Mode (ports 1-2), Isolation Mode, PoE Auto Recovery Cooling Fanless Dimensions 209×126×26 mm Power Consumption No PD: ~7 W; with 63 W PD: ~77 W Temperature Range Operating: 0°C–40°C; Storage: –40°C–70°C Certifications CE, FCC, RoHS

products.title: TP-LINK 150Mbps Wireless N Nano USB Adapter TL-WN725N
products.subtitle: The TP-Link TL-WN725N is an ultra-compact, high-speed wireless adapter that allows you to connect a desktop or notebook computer to a Wi-Fi network. Its miniature design makes it practically invisible once plugged in, providing a reliable and stable connection without adding bulk to your device.
products.description: TP-Link TL-WN725N | 150Mbps Wireless N Nano USB Adapter The TL-WN725N is an ultra-compact wireless adapter that allows users to connect a desktop or laptop computer to a Wi-Fi network at speeds of up to 150 Mbps . Its miniature "Nano" design is built for ultimate convenience—once plugged into a USB port, it can be left there indefinitely without obstructing other ports or getting in the way when you pack your laptop. Key Features Sleek Nano Design: So small that it sits almost flush with the USB port. It’s perfect for travel or for use with laptops where standard-sized adapters might be bumped or damaged. Fast Wireless N Speed: Provides speeds up to 150 Mbps , ideal for smooth video streaming, voice streaming, and basic online gaming. Advanced Security: Supports 64/128 WEP, WPA, PA2/WPA-PSK/WPA2-PSK(TKIP/AES) encryption standards to ensure your wireless connection is safe from intruders. Easy Setup: Comes with a user-friendly setup utility on a CD (and digital drivers online) for quick, hassle-free installation. SoftAP Mode: Easily turn a wired internet connection to a PC or Laptop into a Wi-Fi hotspot for other mobile devices. Technical Specifications Feature Details Wireless Speed Up to 150 Mbps Wireless Standards IEEE 802.11b, IEEE 802.11g, IEEE 802.11n Interface USB 2.0 Antenna Internal Antenna Dimensions 18.6 × 15 × 7.1 mm System Requirements Windows 11/10/8.1/8/7, Mac OS, Linux

products.title: TP-Link 150Mbps Wireless N PCI Express Adapter
products.subtitle: TP-Link 150Mbps Wireless N PCI Express Adapter, providing reliable and fast wireless connectivity for desktop PCs.

products.title: TP-LINK 16-Port Gigabit Desktop/Rackmount Switch TL-SG1016D
products.subtitle: The TP-Link TL-SG1016D is an efficient, high-performance Gigabit switch designed for those looking to upgrade their network to 1000 Mbps. Featuring 16 ports in a versatile housing, it provides a seamless way to boost your network backbone and bring high-speed connectivity to every connected device, from servers to workstations.
products.description: TP-Link TL-SG1016D | 16-Port Gigabit Desktop/Rackmount Switch The TL-SG1016D is an efficient, high-performance upgrade designed to transition your network to Gigabit speeds. Featuring a versatile desktop and rackmount design, this 16-port switch provides a massive boost to your network capacity, allowing for the instantaneous transfer of large, bandwidth-intensive files in professional or home office environments. Key Features 16 Gigabit Ports: Equipped with 16 10/100/1000 Mbps RJ45 ports that support Auto MDI/MDIX, eliminating the need for crossover cables. Green Ethernet Technology: Incorporates innovative energy-efficient features that expand your network capacity with much less power, automatically adjusting consumption according to link status and cable length. High Performance: Features a non-blocking switching architecture that forwards and filters packets at full wire-speed for maximum throughput. Plug and Play: Simple "Plug and Play" setup requires no configuration or software. Its auto-negotiation features ensure the switch intelligently adjusts for compatibility and optimal performance. Quiet and Durable: The fanless design ensures silent operation, making it perfect for office workspaces. Housed in a sturdy 13-inch steel case for long-lasting durability. Traffic Optimization: Supports 802.3X Flow Control for reliable data transfer and better network stability. Technical Specifications Feature Details Interface 16 × 10/100/1000 Mbps RJ45 Ports Switching Capacity 32 Gbps Packet Forwarding Rate 23.8 Mpps Mounting Desktop or Rackmount (includes rackmount kit) Power Supply 100–240VAC, 50/60Hz (Internal) Dimensions 294 × 180 × 44 mm

products.title: TP-LINK 16-Port Gigabit Desktop Switch TL-SG116

products.description: TP-Link TL-SG116 | 16-Port Gigabit Desktop Switch The TL-SG116 is a high-performance, unmanaged desktop switch designed for small to medium-sized office networks or home entertainment setups. Featuring 16 non-blocking Gigabit ports, it provides a massive boost to your network capacity, enabling instant large file transfers without bottlenecking your connection. Key Features 16 Gigabit Ports: Equipped with 16 10/100/1000 Mbps Auto-Negotiation RJ45 ports that greatly expand your network capacity. Green Ethernet Technology: Latest innovative energy-efficient features save power consumption by up to 82% , automatically adjusting power based on link status and cable length. Plug and Play: No configuration or software required. Auto MDI/MDIX eliminates the need for crossover cables. Traffic Optimization: Supports 802.1p/DSCP QoS to enable smooth latency-sensitive traffic such as voice and video, and IGMP Snooping to optimize Multicast data streams (like IPTV). Durable Metal Casing: A sturdy, compact metal housing ensures a long product life and is designed for desktop or wall-mounting. Silent Operation: Fanless design ensures quiet operation, making it ideal for noise-sensitive environments like offices or libraries. Technical Specifications Feature Details Interface 16 × 10/100/1000 Mbps RJ45 Ports Switching Capacity 32 Gbps Packet Forwarding Rate 23.8 Mpps Advanced Features Green Technology, 802.3X Flow Control, 802.1p/DSCP QoS Power Supply External Power Adapter (Output: 12VDC / 1.0A) Dimensions 286 × 111.7 × 25.4 mm

products.title: TP‑Link 5-Port 10/100Mbps Desktop Switch with 4-Port PoE+
products.subtitle: 5‑port desktop Ethernet switch (RJ45) with 4 PoE+ ports for data and power over a single cable, plug‑and‑play with no configuration needed
products.description: Product Overview The TL-SF1005P from TP-Link is an unmanaged desktop Ethernet switch featuring 5 RJ45 10/100 Mbps ports, 4 of which support PoE+ (802.3af/at), delivering both data and power over a single cable for plug-and-play convenience. Key Use Cases Powering IP cameras in locations where power outlets are scarce or inaccessible. Connecting IP phones and wireless access points without needing separate power adapters. Supporting high-quality video conferencing or surveillance with prioritized ports for latency-sensitive applications. Usage Warnings Ensure each powered device does not exceed per-port PoE limits (up to 30 W) and the total PoE budget (67 W). Use high quality Ethernet cabling (CAT5e or higher), especially when using Extend Mode over long distances (up to 250 m). Avoid connecting devices that exceed power budget to prevent shutdown of lower priority ports. Technical Specifications (Table) Specification Details Ports 5 × RJ45 10/100 Mbps (4 × PoE+). PoE Standard IEEE 802.3af/at. Power per Port Up to 30 W. Total PoE Budget 67 W. Extend Mode Data and power transmission up to 250 m (10 Mbps). Priority Mode Ports 1–2 have higher priority for sensitive applications. PoE Auto Recovery Automatically reboots unresponsive powered devices. Physical Build Metal casing, fanless desktop design, wall-mountable. Dimensions 99.8 × 98 × 25 mm. Max Power Consumption 3.44 W (no PDs) up to 74.49 W (with full PoE load).

Priority Mode (Ports 1–2): One-click prioritization ensures that sensitive applications like video monitoring receive high-quality data transmission, even when the network is busy. products.description: TL-SF1005LP | 5-Port 10/100Mbps Desktop Switch with 4-Port PoE+ The TP-Link TL-SF1005LP is a reliable and cost-effective unmanaged switch designed for small businesses and home users who need a simple way to power network devices. By integrating data and power into a single Ethernet cable, it simplifies installation and reduces clutter, making it an excellent choice for desktop or small-scale surveillance setups.
