products.description: تعريف المنتج Archer TX20UH هو محوّل لاسلكي USB 3.0 من TP-Link يعمل بتقنية Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) ويُقدّم سرعات تصل إلى 1201 ميجابت/ثانية على تردد 5 جيجاهرتز و574 ميجابت/ثانية على 2.4 جيجاهرتز، مع هوائيات عالية الكسب وتقنيات Beamforming لتحسين الاستقبال والاتصال. أبرز الاستخدامات تعزيز تجربة الألعاب وتقليل التأخّر (Low-Latency) بفضل OFDMA وMU-MIMO. تغطية أفضل للمنازل أو المكاتب باستخدام هوائيات قابلة التعديل وتقنية Beamforming. دعم بث الفيديو عالي الجودة وتنزيل الملفات الكبيرة بسرعة عبر واجهة USB 3.0. تحذيرات الاستخدام مروّل بدقة نحو جهاز التوجيه Wi-Fi لتحصيل أفضل إشارة. ضمان التوافق مع أنظمة التشغيل Windows 10 أو 11—يفضّل تثبيت أحدث التعريفات. تجنّب درجات الحرارة المرتفعة أو الرطوبة الزائدة (تشغيل بين 0-40 °C). جدول المواصفات الفنية المييزة التفاصيل المعيار اللاسلكي IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax (Wi-Fi 6) سرعة الاتصال 5 GHz: حتى 1201 Mbps (11ax); 2.4 GHz: حتى 574 Mbps (11ax) :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1} الهوائيات هوائيات عالية الكسب مزدوجة قابلة للتعديل – Beamforming :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2} الأمان WEP, WPA/WPA2/WPA3، WPA-PSK/WPA2-PSK :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3} التقنيات المدعومة OFDMA، MU-MIMO لتقليل التأخّر وتحسين الأداء :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4} واجهة الاتصال USB 3.0 (SuperSpeed) أسرع بـ 10× من USB 2.0 :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5} التوافق Windows 10، Windows 11 :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6} الأبعاد 30.5 × 14.8 × 111.7 مم :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7} الشهادة والمحتويات FCC, CE, RoHS؛ يشمل محوّل، دليل التثبيت السريع، قاعدة USB 3.0 :contentReference[oaicite:8]{index=8}

products.title: TP‑Link Archer VR300
products.subtitle: Dual‑band (AC1200) wireless VDSL/ADSL modem router delivering up to 1200 Mbps combined speeds, excellent coverage via four external antennas, and easy management through the TP‑Link Tether app
products.description: Product Definition The TP-Link Archer VR300 is an AC1200 dual-band wireless VDSL/ADSL modem router that is compatible with VDSL2 and ADSL2+ technologies. It can also function as a standalone wireless router through its LAN/WAN port, providing both wired and wireless connectivity ideal for home or office use. Main Uses Connects to the Internet via VDSL or ADSL at speeds up to 100 Mbps. Dual-band Wi-Fi: 300 Mbps at 2.4 GHz and 867 Mbps at 5 GHz. Excellent coverage and reliability with four 5 dBi external antennas. Easy setup and management through web interface or the TP-Link Tether app. Features like Parental Controls, Guest Network, QoS, IPTV, IPv6 support, and 6 kV lightning protection. Usage Warnings Avoid placing the device in damp environments or direct sunlight, or areas with high temperature. Do not remove the casing or tamper with internal components; servicing should be done by professionals only. For electromagnetic compliance, use only approved, high-quality cables to avoid interference. Technical Specifications Table Feature Specification Wireless Speed 300 Mbps (2.4 GHz) + 867 Mbps (5 GHz) Wired Ports 3× 10/100 Mbps LAN, 1× 10/100 Mbps LAN/WAN, 1× RJ11 Antennas 4× fixed, 5 dBi each Features Parental Control, QoS, IPv6, IPTV, Guest Network, VPN Pass-Through Power Supply 12V / 1A Dimensions 230 × 144 × 37 mm

products.title: TP-Link Archer VR400
products.subtitle: A dual-band (2.4 GHz & 5 GHz) wireless VDSL/ADSL modem router offering a combined Wi‑Fi speed of up to 1.2 Gbps, with advanced technologies for enhanced coverage and network stability
products.description: Product Definition The TP-Link Archer VR400 is an integrated VDSL/ADSL modem and dual-band wireless router designed to meet the smart home and home networking needs. It delivers fast, reliable internet connectivity with broad Wi-Fi coverage and user-friendly operation. Key Uses Distributes high-speed internet throughout the home via dual-band Wi-Fi. Supports VDSL2 and ADSL2+/ADSL protocols for broad ISP compatibility. Backup options via LAN/WAN port or 3G/4G modem via USB. Ideal for online gaming, HD video streaming, and large file downloads. Usage Warnings Avoid exposing the device to humidity or temperatures above 40 °C. Use original power adapters to prevent damage. Set up security protocols such as WPA2 to safeguard the wireless network. Regular firmware updates are recommended for optimal performance and security. Technical Specifications Table Specification Details Total Wi-Fi Speed 5 GHz: 867 Mbps, 2.4 GHz: 300 Mbps (aggregate ~1.2 Gbps) Special Technologies MU-MIMO, Beamforming, OneMesh Ports 3× Gigabit LAN, 1× Gigabit LAN/WAN, 1× DSL (RJ11), 1× USB 2.0 DSL Standards VDSL2, ADSL2+/ADSL2/ADSL Backup Connectivity LAN/WAN fallback, 3G/4G modem via USB Network Management Tether App (iOS/Android), Web UI Wireless Security WPA/WPA2, WEP Dimensions 215.6 × 124.6 × 31.6 mm Operating Temperature 0 °C – 40 °C Humidity 10 % – 90 % (non-condensing)

products.title: TP‑Link Archer VR600 AC1600 Wireless Gigabit VDSL/ADSL Modem Router
products.subtitle: A dual‑band (2.4 GHz & 5 GHz) AC1600 wireless DSL modem router offering combined speeds up to 1.6 Gbps, featuring VDSL/ADSL support, beamforming, USB port, and a LAN/WAN backup option
products.description: Product Definition The TP-Link Archer VR600 is an AC1600 dual-band VDSL/ADSL wireless modem router, combining modem and router functionalities with wireless speeds up to 1.6 Gbps (300 Mbps on 2.4 GHz and 1300 Mbps on 5 GHz). Key Uses Lag-free online gaming and HD streaming. VDSL2 support up to 100 Mbps over traditional ADSL connections. 3G/4G USB dongle support as a backup internet source. LAN/WAN port for fallback cable or fiber connectivity. Usage Warnings Ensure using the correct DSL port according to your connection type (VDSL or ADSL). Avoid placing the device near wireless interference sources or metals to maintain signal strength. Do not upgrade firmware while the device is powered off or disconnected. Technical Specifications Feature Details Wi-Fi Speed 2.4 GHz: 300 Mbps; 5 GHz: 1300 Mbps Technologies 802.11ac, Beamforming, QoS Ports DSL port, Gigabit LAN/WAN, 4× Gigabit LAN, USB for 3G/4G VDSL2 Speed Up to 100 Mbps Management Tether app & Remote management via TP-Link Cloud

products.title: TP-LINK AV600 Powerline Wi-Fi Kit TL-WPA4220 KIT
products.subtitle: Extend your wired and wireless network to any room in your home using your existing electrical circuitry. The TP-Link TL-WPA4220 KIT eliminates dead zones and provides a stable, high-speed connection through walls and floors without the need for new wires or drilling.
products.description: TP-Link TL-WPA4220 KIT | AV600 Wi-Fi Powerline Extender Kit The TL-WPA4220 KIT expands your internet connection to every room of your house through your home’s existing electrical circuitry. With the Wi-Fi Clone button, you can simplify your setup by copying your network name and password from your router, ensuring a seamless roaming experience throughout your home or office. Key Features One-Touch Wi-Fi Extension: The Wi-Fi Clone button simplifies your Wi-Fi configuration and helps build a seamless, unified home network. HomePlug AV Standard: Provides up to 600 Mbps high-speed data transmission over a home's existing electrical wiring, ideal for lag-free HD or 3D video streaming and online gaming. Extend Wireless Connections: Expand 300 Mbps wireless connections to previously hard-to-reach areas of your home or office. Multiple Ethernet Ports: Two Ethernet ports allow your wired devices (like consoles, smart TVs, or PCs) to connect to high-speed internet simultaneously. Plug and Play: Set up your powerline network in minutes. Just plug, pair, and play. Technical Specifications Feature Details Powerline Speed Up to 600 Mbps Wi-Fi Speed Up to 300 Mbps (2.4 GHz) Interface 2 × 10/100 Mbps Ethernet Ports Range Up to 300 Meters / 1000 Feet over electrical circuit Security 128-bit AES Encryption (Powerline), WPA-PSK / WPA2-PSK (Wi-Fi) Dimensions 94 × 54 × 40 mm (Extender)

products.title: TP-Link AX3000 Ceiling Mount WiFi 6 Access Point EAP650
products.subtitle: TP-Link Wi-Fi 6 access point offering speeds up to 2976 Mbps, ceiling or wall mountable, centrally managed via Omada platform, and powered via PoE+
products.description: Wi-Fi 6 Access Point – TP-Link EAP650 The TP-Link EAP650 is a high-performance wireless access point featuring Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) technology with speeds up to 2976 Mbps (574 Mbps on 2.4 GHz and 2402 Mbps on 5 GHz). It boasts a slim and elegant design (Φ160 mm × 33.6 mm), ideal for ceiling or wall mounting, and offers advanced features such as: Centralized management via the Omada SDN platform, locally or through the cloud. Support for 160 MHz channels (HE160) to double data throughput. Seamless roaming for uninterrupted connectivity during movement. Omada Mesh capability for wireless linkage between access points without extra cabling. Flexible powering via 802.3at PoE+ or included DC power adapter. Key Use Cases: Ideal for offices, hospitality, educational facilities, shopping malls, and conference rooms where high-performance, seamless Wi-Fi and centralized management are required. Usage Warnings: Not recommended for outdoor use unless using the dedicated outdoor variant of the product. Ensure using a compatible PoE source to avoid power issues. Install away from heat sources and within an operating temperature range of 0–40 °C. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Radio Bands & Speed 2.4 GHz (574 Mbps), 5 GHz (2402 Mbps) Ports 1× Gigabit RJ-45 (PoE+ support), Reset Button Power Options 802.3at PoE+ or 12V DC (adapter included) Dimensions Φ160 mm × 33.6 mm Antennas 2.4 GHz: 2× 4 dBi, 5 GHz: 2× 5 dBi (internal) Standards 802.11ax/ac/n/g/b/a Security WPA-Personal/Enterprise, WPA2, WPA3, 802.1X authentication, rogue AP detection Management Omada App, OC controllers, SNMP, SSH, HTTP/HTTPS, Cloud Access Operating Temp. 0–40 °C

products.title: TP-LINK AX3000 Dual Band Gigabit Wi-Fi 6 Router Archer AX53
products.subtitle: Upgrade your home network with the TP-Link Archer AX53 , a powerful Wi-Fi 6 router designed to deliver next-generation speed and efficiency. With a combined throughput of up to 3.0 Gbps , it provides the bandwidth necessary for smooth 4K streaming, rapid downloads, and lag-free gaming across multiple devices simultaneously.
products.description: TP-Link Archer AX53 | AX3000 Dual-Band Gigabit Wi-Fi 6 Router Upgrade your home network with the Archer AX53 , a high-performance Wi-Fi 6 router designed to deliver next-generation speeds and efficiency. With AX3000 technology, it provides a massive boost in capacity and bandwidth, making it perfect for high-definition streaming, online gaming, and multiple connected devices. Key Features Next-Gen Gigabit Wi-Fi 6 Speed: Reach speeds up to 2402 Mbps on the 5 GHz band and 574 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band for smoother streaming and faster downloads. Connect More, Stay Fast: OFDMA technology increases capacity by 4 times to enable simultaneous transmission to more devices. Ultra-Low Latency: Enables more responsive gaming and video chatting by reducing lag across all connected devices. Expanded Wi-Fi Coverage: Four high-gain external antennas and Beamforming technology combine to extend strong, reliable Wi-Fi throughout your home. TP-Link HomeShield: Premium security services keep your home network safe with cutting-edge network and IoT protection. EasyMesh-Compatible: Flexibly creates a whole-home Mesh Wi-Fi by connecting to other EasyMesh-compatible routers. Technical Specifications Feature Details Wi-Fi Standards Wi-Fi 6 (IEEE 802.11ax/ac/n/a 5 GHz, IEEE 802.11ax/n/b/g 2.4 GHz) Processor Dual-Core CPU Ethernet Ports 1 × Gigabit WAN Port, 4 × Gigabit LAN Ports Security WPA3, WPA2, WPA, WPA2-Enterprise Antennas 4 × Fixed High-Performance Antennas Power 12 V / 2 A

products.title: TP-LINK AX3000 High Gain Wireless USB Adapter Archer TX50UH

This powerful USB adapter brings high-speed Wi-Fi 6 performance to your device, offering a stable and ultra-fast connection that is perfect for professional gaming, 4K streaming, and large file transfers.

With its high-gain antennas and cradle design, it ensures a powerful and stable connection for pro-level gaming, seamless 4K streaming, and fast file transfers, even when your computer is far from the router. Key Features Fast Wi-Fi 6 Speed: Experience ultra-fast dual-band speeds up to 3000 Mbps ( $2402$ Mbps on 5 GHz and $574$ Mbps on 2.4 GHz). High-Gain Dual-Band Antennas: Adjustable multi-angle antennas combine with Beamforming technology to concentrate signals toward your router for better reception. Ultra-Low Latency: OFDMA and MU-MIMO technologies ensure the most efficient Wi-Fi connection for your PC, reducing lag during intensive online tasks. SuperSpeed USB 3.0: Experience blazing-fast data transfers up to 10× faster than USB 2.0, ensuring the adapter's performance is never bottlenecked. Flexible Design: Includes a 1.2-meter USB 3.0 cable and a dedicated cradle, allowing you to position the adapter in the best spot for signal reception. Advanced Security: Supports the latest WPA3 encryption to protect your personal data from cyber threats. Ultra-Low Latency: Wi-Fi 6 technology significantly reduces lag, ensuring more responsive gaming and video chatting. TP-Link HomeShield: Provides comprehensive network protection, robust parental controls, and real-time IoT security. products.title: TP-LINK Bluetooth 4.0 Nano USB Adapter UB400
products.subtitle: The TP-Link UB400 turns your non-Bluetooth PC or laptop into a Bluetooth-capable device. Its ultra-small, sleek design allows you to plug it into any USB port and leave it there, providing seamless wireless connectivity for all your favorite peripherals.
products.description: TP-Link UB400 | Bluetooth 4.0 Nano USB Adapter The UB400 turns your non-Bluetooth PC or laptop into a Bluetooth-capable device. With its ultra-small "Nano" design, you can plug it into any USB port and leave it there without worrying about it blocking other ports or getting damaged while you're on the move. Experience the freedom of wireless connectivity for your peripherals and mobile devices. Key Features Bluetooth 4.0 Technology: Equipped with the latest Bluetooth 4.0 with Low Energy (BLE) technology, ensuring stable and energy-efficient wireless communication. Plug and Play: For Windows 8, 8.1, 10, and 11, simply plug the UB400 into your USB port to enjoy a fast, automatic connection (supports Win 7/XP with driver installation). Nano-Sized Design: Ultra-small and sleek, making it convenient to leave in your laptop even when traveling. Broad Operation Range: Enjoy reliable wireless transmission at distances of up to 10 meters , allowing you to listen to music or print from across the room. Versatile Connectivity: Easily connect your PC to Bluetooth-enabled headsets, controllers, mice, keyboards, printers, and smartphones simultaneously. products.title: TP-Link Deco E4 (3-Pack) AC1200 Whole Home Mesh Wi-Fi System
products.subtitle: AC1200 Whole Home Mesh Wi-Fi System covering up to 370 m², supports up to 100 devices, with parental controls and easy app setup.

Utilizing advanced mesh technology, Deco units work together to form a unified network with a single network name, ensuring stable connections as you move around your home. Key Features: Wi-Fi coverage up to 370 m² (3 units). Supports up to 100 connected devices simultaneously. Easy setup and management via the Deco app. Advanced parental controls to manage online time and block inappropriate content. Multiple modes: Router, Access Point. Usage Warnings: Does not support DSL or 3G/4G modem connections. No USB port available. Initial setup requires the Deco app. Technical Specifications: Feature Description Wireless Standards IEEE 802.11 ac/n/a 5GHz, IEEE 802.11 b/g/n 2.4GHz Wireless Speed 867Mbps at 5GHz + 300Mbps at 2.4GHz Ports 2 Ethernet ports 10/100Mbps per unit Dimensions 190 × 90.7 × 90.7 mm Coverage Up to 370 m² (3 units) Supported Devices Up to 100 devices Operating Modes Router, Access Point Parental Controls Yes App Setup Yes, via Deco app

products.subtitle: AX1500 Whole Home Mesh Wi-Fi 6 System with speeds up to 1500 Mbps, covering up to 360 m², and supporting up to 120 devices.

products.title: TP-Link Deco X20 (2-Pack)
products.subtitle: A Wi-Fi 6 whole-home mesh system delivering seamless, efficient coverage—a unified mesh network with a 2-pack setup
products.description: TP-Link Deco X20 System (2-Pack) Definition: A whole-home Wi-Fi 6 mesh system consisting of two units working together to deliver seamless and efficient wireless coverage. Key Uses: Eliminates Wi-Fi dead zones throughout the home. Provides coverage of up to approximately 4,000 ft² (370 m²) with the 2-pack. Supports simultaneous connection of up to 150 devices. Ensures low latency for gaming and smooth 4K streaming. Quick and easy setup via the Deco app. Usage Warnings: Actual performance depends on environmental factors like walls and obstacles. Full benefit requires client devices that support Wi-Fi 6. Ethernet backhaul, if available, enhances mesh performance. Specification Details Wireless Standard Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax), Dual-Band Max Speed 2.4 GHz: 574 Mbps; 5 GHz: 1201 Mbps (total ~1800 Mbps) Coverage Up to 4,000 ft² using the 2-pack Device Capacity Up to 150 devices Ports Each unit has 2 × Gigabit Ethernet (WAN/LAN auto-sensing) Wireless Technologies OFDMA, MU-MIMO, BSS Color, Beamforming Security WPA3; TP-Link HomeShield (Parental Controls, QoS, Antivirus, Reports) Processor Quad-Core ~1 GHz Operating Modes Router mode, Access Point mode Setup Via Deco mobile app (iOS & Android)

products.title: TP Link DS1018GMP Omada 18-Port Gigabit Unmanaged Rackmount Switch with 16-Port PoE+
products.subtitle: The DS1018GMP is a high-performance, rack-mountable Gigabit PoE switch designed to meet the demands of high-definition IP surveillance and professional networking. Equipped with 16 Gigabit PoE+ ports and 2 Gigabit SFP slots , this switch provides a seamless connection for powered devices such as 4K IP cameras, wireless access points, and VoIP phones. With its high power budget and plug-and-play simplicity, it is an ideal solution for businesses looking to expand their network without complex configuration.

products.title: TP-Link EAP115 300Mbps Wireless N Ceiling Mount Access Point
products.subtitle: Compact ceiling-mount wireless access point delivering up to 300Mbps speed, supports PoE and managed via Omada platform.
products.description: TP-Link EAP115 300Mbps Wireless N Ceiling Mount Access Point Professional Business WiFi with Seamless Centralized Management The EAP115 is a high-performance, cost-effective wireless solution designed for modern business environments. Part of the Omada family, this access point combines a sleek, "smoke detector" style design with powerful enterprise features. It mounts easily to any ceiling or wall, blending perfectly into office or hospitality decor while providing stable, high-speed 2.4GHz WiFi. Key Features Integrated into Omada SDN: Access Cloud Management and Remote Monitoring via the Omada app or software controller. Manage hundreds of EAPs from a single interface. Easy Mounting Design: The simple "twist-and-lock" chassis makes installation on any ceiling or wall surface quick and hassle-free. Power over Ethernet (PoE) Support: Supports 802.3af PoE , allowing you to deploy the AP in areas without power outlets using a single Ethernet cable (PoE Injector or Switch required). Captive Portal for Guests: Professional guest authentication method via SMS, Facebook, or Voucher—ideal for cafes, hotels, and retail stores. Enterprise-Grade Security: Includes Multi-SSID support (up to 8 SSIDs), Rogue AP detection, and WPA/WPA2-enterprise encryption for maximum network safety. Optimized Performance: Features Load Balancing and Rate Limit settings to ensure all users get a fair share of bandwidth even in high-density areas. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Wireless Speed 2.4GHz: Up to 300Mbps Antennas 2 x 4dBi Internal Omni Power Supply 802.3af PoE or External 9VDC / 0.6A Adapter Interface 1 x 10/100Mbps Ethernet Port Mounting Ceiling or Wall Mount (Kits included) Dimensions 189.4 × 172.3 × 29.5 mm Why Choose the EAP115? "The EAP115 is the ultimate 'hidden' workhorse. It’s thin enough to go unnoticed on a ceiling, yet powerful enough to manage dozens of simultaneous guest connections. For small businesses looking to scale their WiFi on a budget, this is the gold standard." Ideal For: Hotels & B&Bs: Provide guest WiFi in hallways and rooms with a professional login page. Offices: Scale your network as you add more desks without messy wiring. Retail Stores: Connect POS systems and customer mobile devices reliably.

products.title: TP-Link EAP225 AC1350 Wireless MU-MIMO Gigabit Ceiling Mount Access Point
products.subtitle: Dual-band wireless access point delivering up to 1350 Mbps speeds, featuring MU-MIMO technology, Gigabit port, and PoE support, ideal for ceiling installations in commercial environments.

products.description: Product Definition The TP-Link ER605 is a professional-grade Gigabit VPN router designed for secure and efficient inter-branch connectivity over the Internet. Seamlessly integrated with the Omada SDN platform, it enables centralized management via cloud or the Omada app. Key Uses Securely interconnect branch offices with VPN tunnels (IPsec, OpenVPN, L2TP, PPTP). Keep firmware updated for continued security and reliability. products.description: TP-Link TL-SG1048 | 48-Port Gigabit Rackmount Switch Upgrade your network to Gigabit speeds with plug-and-play simplicity. The TL-SG1048 is engineered for high-density environments that require reliable, high-speed connectivity. Featuring a non-blocking switching architecture, this 48-port switch filters and forwards packets at full wire-speed for maximum throughput. It is the ideal choice for businesses looking to eliminate bottlenecks while keeping energy costs low. Key Features 48 Gigabit Ports: Every port provides up to 1000Mbps, significantly expanding your network capacity and enabling instant large file transfers. Plug-and-Play: No configuration required. Auto MDI/MDIX eliminates the need for crossover cables, and auto-negotiation senses the link speed of each network device for intelligent compatibility. Energy Efficient: Innovative "Green Technology" adjusts power consumption according to link status and cable length, reducing your carbon footprint and operating costs. Standard Rackmount Design: Housed in a sturdy 19-inch steel case, it’s designed for easy installation in standard racks, making it a perfect fit for server rooms. High Performance: Supports 802.3x flow control for Full Duplex mode and backpressure for Half Duplex mode to alleviate traffic congestion. (440 × 260 × 44 mm)

products.title: UCM6302  Grandstream IPPBX, 2 FXO, 2 FXS, 1000 Users, 150 Concurrent Calls
products.subtitle: The UCM6302 allows businesses to build powerful and scalable unified communication and collaboration solutions. It supports up to 1,000 users and provides a centralized platform for all business communications, including voice, video calling, video conferencing, video surveillance, web meetings, data, analytics, and facility access. With the UCM6302, your team can stay connected from anywhere via desktop, mobile, and other IP endpoints.
products.description: Description The UCM6302 allows businesses to build powerful and scalable unified communication and collaboration solutions. This series of IP PBXs provide a platform that unifies all business communication on one centralized network, including voice, video calling, video conferencing, video surveillance, web meetings, data, analytics, mobility, facility access, intercoms and more. The UCM6302 series supports up to 1000 users and includes a built-in web meetings and video conferencing solution that allows employees to connect from the desktop, mobile, GVC series devices and IP phones. It can be paired with the UCM6302 ecosystem to offer a hybrid platform that combines the control of an on-premise IP PBX with the remote access of a cloud solution. The UCM6302 ecosystem consists of the Wave app for web and mobile, which provides a hub for collaborting remotely, and UCM RemoteConnect, a cloud NAT traversal service for ensuring secure remote connections. The UCM6302 series also offers cloud setup and management through GDMS and an API for integration with third-party platforms. By offering a high-end unified communications and collaboration solution packed with a suite of mobility, security, meeting and collaboration tools, the UCM6302 series provides a powerful platform for any organization. Enterprise Security: Includes a built-in firewall, high-availability support, and comprehensive encryption to keep your communications secure.

Its standout feature is the integrated T1/E1/J1 interface , allowing direct connection to digital primary rate interfaces (PRI). Supporting up to 2,000 users and 200 concurrent calls , this heavy-duty appliance provides a scalable, secure, and reliable communication hub without any licensing fees or recurring costs.
products.description: Description Description The UCM6510 creates an easily manageable on premise anchor to your communications network. This enterprise-grade IP PBX comes equipped with a suite of advanced call handling and network data features, all with no licensing and no fees. Its scalability offers deployments that can support up to 2000 users, and it supports E1, T1 and J1. The UCM6510 series allows businesses to unify multiple communication technologies, such as voice, video, surveillance, data tools, and facilities access management into one common platform that can be managed and accessed remotely. With features such as customizable call-routing, multi-level IVRs, call queues, auto-attendant, call detail records, multi-site peering, SIP video support, voicemail/fax forwarding to email and more, the UCM6510 delivers complete unified communications. products.description: The Netsys NS-501GL12U6045 is a professional-grade, wall-mounted server rack designed for high-efficiency networking in tight spaces. With a 12U capacity and a shallow 450mm depth , it is specifically engineered for "edge" networking—housing patch panels, switches, and shallow AV equipment where a full-sized floor cabinet isn't feasible. Technical Specifications Feature Specification Model NS-501GL12U6045 Form Factor 12U Wall-Mount (Standard 19") Dimensions (WxDxH) 600mm x 450mm x 635mm Material SPCC Cold Rolled Steel Load Capacity Up to 60kg (Static Load) Front Door Toughened glass with lockable swivel handle Finish Degreasing, Phosphoric, Powder Coated Key Features Space-Saving Profile: The 450mm depth is the standout feature. It allows the rack to be installed in hallways, closets, or small retail offices without obstructing foot traffic, while still providing ample vertical space (12U) for a complete network stack. Thermal Efficiency: The top and bottom panels feature vented slots for natural convection. Additionally, the top panel is pre-configured with a mounting hole for a 120mm cooling fan to ensure active heat dissipation for high-performance switches. Secure & Transparent: The tempered glass front door provides a high-end look and allows for instant visual status checks of LED indicators without needing to unlock the cabinet. Easy Maintenance: Features removable side panels with quick-release latches, allowing technicians to access the sides of equipment for wiring or hardware swaps without dismounting the entire rack. Flexible Cable Entry: Multiple knock-out holes on the top and bottom covers provide clean cable routing, helping to maintain a professional and organized look. Ideal Applications SMB Networking: Housing a router, 24/48-port switch, and patch panel. Smart Home/AV: Organizing home automation controllers, amplifiers, and media servers. Security Systems: Securing an NVR (Network Video Recorder) and PoE injectors for CCTV setups. Note: Because this is a 450mm deep model, it is not suitable for full-depth enterprise servers. Please verify that your equipment's mounting depth is less than 350mm–400mm to allow for cable clearance at the rear.

products.description: Product Overview The NS-505OD15U6045 is built to safeguard your critical hardware against harsh weather, dust, and unauthorized access. This 15U cabinet is IP55-rated , meaning it is engineered to resist water spray and prevent dust ingress, making it the perfect choice for rooftops, industrial sites, and exterior walls. Its durable construction and thermal management features ensure that your equipment remains operational even in extreme conditions. Key Features Generous 15U Capacity: Provides fifteen units of vertical mounting space, allowing for more extensive equipment setups compared to smaller 9U or 12U outdoor models. IP55 Weatherproof Rating: Offers robust protection against the elements, ensuring that rain, snow, and wind-blown dust do not reach your sensitive electronics. 450mm Mounting Depth: Designed to fit standard rack-mount switches, patch panels, and small UPS units while minimizing the outward protrusion from the wall. Advanced Security: Features a reinforced front door with a high-security 3-point locking system to protect against vandalism and tampering in public or remote areas. Thermal Control: Includes integrated ventilation with support for optional cooling fans to maintain a stable internal temperature in direct sunlight or high-heat environments. Anti-Corrosion Build: Constructed from high-quality cold-rolled steel with a specialized outdoor powder-coated finish to prevent rust and chemical degradation. Sealed Cable Entry: Bottom-mounted cable entry points with protective glands maintain the cabinet's weather-tight integrity while keeping wiring organized.
